| | Hey Peter --

I haven't spent my whole career in politics like Senator John Cornyn, but one thing I do know for sure is that the only people a senator should work for are their constituents. That's why I'm fighting like hell to replace Senator Cornyn, who works for anyone who writes him a hefty corporate PAC check instead of folks like you.

You might think at some point throughout Sen. Cornyn's 18 years in Washington that he would have grown tired of the boot-licking and started serving Texas families. But old habits die hard and he's spent far too long carrying water for his big-money donors and DC bosses to change now. **We can 't expect Sen. Cornyn to start working for Texans anytime soon. That's why I'm running to replace him -- and I'm asking for your help.** **[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890012/7f51f7bc/4ecac0ac/4ef6878e/1651571826/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1MDEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200604.3nd__1501__&amount=10")** I'm putting my foot down and working to make sure all Texans are heard. As your senator, I will work for all Texans, not just those writing the biggest checks. My entire life has been about service, and I'm stepping up now because the guy in office isn't getting the job done.

My promise to put Texans first scares Sen. Cornyn's special interest allies. That's why groups like the Koch network are coming to his rescue with an unprecedented SEVEN-FIGURE investment in Texas. But I'm not worried because **I know our Texas-sized grassroots team can take them on.** **Let 's show them how powerful our team is!
Pitch in to help me fight back against Senator Cornyn and his bosses.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: America is fixing its justice system AND ensuring that justice is served
body:
Former NFL player Scott Turner became executive director of President Trump’s White House Opportunity and Revitalization Council last year. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4c52349725&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • June 4, 2020
---
| | |
# **America is fixing its justice system AND ensuring that justice is served**

**Former NFL player Scott Turner** became executive director of President Trump’s White House Opportunity and Revitalization Council last year. The Council focuses on help for urban and economically distressed communities throughout our country.

**Turner sat down** with Fox News this morning, where he addressed the recent protests, riots, and other current events facing America and its cities.

🎬 [Scott Turner: We must stand together in unity as America](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f6936054e5&e=3ee4985eea)

**“The President** and the Administration have launched full investigations” into the death of Minnesota man George Floyd, Turner said. Federal, state, and local authorities need to use every resource at their disposal to ensure justice is served quickly, he added.

**For President Trump,** justice means enforcing the law fairly. Whether you’re a bad cop or a rioter hurting people on our streets, no act of violence can ever be tolerated.

**Justice also means** ensuring that every citizen has a real shot at the American Dream. President Trump’s agenda, from job creation to criminal justice reform, is centered on bringing opportunity to every corner of our great country:

* “Everybody said it couldn’t be done,” President Trump said in 2018 before **signing the[historic First Step Act](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d466141a8b&e=3ee4985eea)**[.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b2745164ae&e=3ee4985eea) “They said the conservatives won’t approve it. They said the liberals won’t approve it.” This President got it done, resulting in the first major reforms to America’s criminal justice system in over a decade.

* President Trump is providing **more funding for Historically Black Colleges and Universities (HBCUs)** than any president in history. That includes [$1 billion in relief to HBCUs](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=35bfff4123&e=3ee4985eea) and other minority-serving institutions as part of the Coronavirus pandemic relief package.

* The Trump Administration is promoting **second-chance hiring** in cities across America, with the ambitious goal to [cut the unemployment rate for formerly incarcerated individuals](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4cac1f7bd2&e=3ee4985eea) to single digits within five years.

* President Trump is proving that America can reform its justice system AND **keep our communities safe**. Both the violent crime rate and [the murder rate have fallen](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4d399fcd21&e=3ee4985eea) for two consecutive years under President Trump. During his Administration, the number of murders in America’s major cities has fallen by more than 10 percent.

**Real justice** and progress for every American community will take time, but it starts with building on these important successes. “We need to stand together in unity as America and have those hard conversations and come up with viable outcomes and solutions,” Turner said this morning.

**“We have to value** the life of every American—every American citizen, no matter your color, your ethnicity, [or] your social-economic background.”

**🎬** [President Trump: “We need healing, but we also need strength.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0fa207cc50&e=3ee4985eea)

**Press Secretary** : [Let’s never forget the heroic men and women killed in duty](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9135e432fd&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|

---
|
---
| **President Trump gives remarks at the 2019 Prison Reform Summit and****FIRST STEP********Act****Celebration** | April 1, 2019
---
|

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b125/18e32a7f/4c85befc/7b218fa3/3283369171/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b125/18e32a7f/4c85befc/7b218fa0/3283369171/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. clean_body: | | This is the most important email I've ever sent you: 48 hours ago -- I became your Democratic nominee for this critical Senate race. This morning -- McConnell's Republicans are mobilizing their resources to take me down. "" | "" "" ` ""` If we lose this seat, our historic shot to defeat McConnell's Senate -- and shake up the status quo -- will be ruined. I will fight with everything I have to fend off Republicans' expensive attacks and keep this seat in Democrats' hands. "" Will you rush $10 before midnight? | ** "" "" "" "" "" I can't thank you enough, Ben Ray "" "" "" Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families. Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources. As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United. Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today? "" We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, "". If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. name: Bloomberg Philanthropies
subject: Five reasons to wear orange on Friday
body:
Because gun violence is...

| _You're receiving this email because of your participation with Mike Bloomberg 2020. We'll be sending you updates like this on initiatives and issues we think you'll be interested in. Thank you!_ [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=1f6435b928144d32a5f1ad5d3ed2e036&_e=brbUxD9lwAgtYv_LCFSNGwj12pddPOkkizdJVSEDa2PKbFaBIlIyQgqsUEQZeO20YktiwLTpYGTxreLWiuVqlBa5f-aV6DSjSme_AEJqo_3JxNRNni4sfQ_VcbG_wCrFl1RjvrMhudqtQTmlbax58Ij7hn7K_scOQRII6q9tCITFR69_20tF6Fb03mgtaKUIp6pm7FCzhVM2TK_4kAgcX31ZmUsYH5m3FsF7VLjMgVqko_7fvXYAo3DFVP-xgL8XK2RskDp47LY16uuoIF83hA%3D%3D) Friend, Tomorrow is National Gun Violence Awareness Day, when people across the country will wear orange to show that they are part of the fight against gun violence in America. For years, Mike and Bloomberg Philanthropies have worked alongside Moms Demand Action and Everytown for Gun Safety, an organization Mike helped found, to raise awareness of the scale and cost of gun violence -- and to help end it.

Tomorrow is another chance to come together and demonstrate the strength behind this movement. Here are some of the many reasons why you should join us in wearing orange: **Because gun violence is a public health issue. ** **[](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=1f6435b928144d32a5f1ad5d3ed2e036&_e=brbUxD9lwAgtYv_LCFSNG5Jbt818Ie6E9dOxnsrqSymIPccdIIDklE_sP-1rCAXpjPA4yKJ9DP3z4fxeg83xV9o25qq1iCUsVydzCmtNIH5a5G4lX60lL1RV-PVsSYbR5dXhh7_4bnnhiDGdi9NmZ79rRlvC9r6fAlmK6CsW7SQTUWxDbeJj0kehx_S9Zc0w2_KI7tShLl3bKUz0N3jrj0MNrpukspf2evuvQ2Qq0_K82hVXh33HSEVvuufAYI-V2tJevip6ES4mNLWk-0IEsqbDHTeHkJmp6bZdQU2Kl6-YdGs5ynfo2LqwhF1sUjlfnhmuutrWTpoZHvZ1k-dLFQ%3D%3D)****Because gun violence is a racial justice issue. ** **[](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=1f6435b928144d32a5f1ad5d3ed2e036&_e=brbUxD9lwAgtYv_LCFSNG5Jbt818Ie6E9dOxnsrqSymIPccdIIDklE_sP-1rCAXpjPA4yKJ9DP3z4fxeg83xV9o25qq1iCUsVydzCmtNIH5a5G4lX60lL1RV-PVsSYbR02xSsadfMA4Z4ylnXwXwe-oRAp8302FqgCh7uOdRmqvsEQ5Eo6QC4a1naMuZrcitTd2MD6V6f4yvvQQV9kU6zqSQs5TCCrf-Qj3a3e-b4Fd43BvezllOzsn9Ub44BsQTpa00Gn77UUh9uCFgNQeieAulz-9tqgRih2mwT_3uqjVJSPFBGb1rSRTlUGvrIq6oewR1AMIkXHBDNuwwVuoJPA%3D%3D)

Because our children deserve to grow up safely. ** **[](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=1f6435b928144d32a5f1ad5d3ed2e036&_e=brbUxD9lwAgtYv_LCFSNG5Jbt818Ie6E9dOxnsrqSymIPccdIIDklE_sP-1rCAXpjPA4yKJ9DP3z4fxeg83xV9o25qq1iCUsVydzCmtNIH5a5G4lX60lL1RV-PVsSYbRZrC0GW95FmGx32EmDMv89mztaZIZj4cI5TZ7896hFmEK7urKlnXrldhav8Rr8rVwIrlWZtiWy82lpPfYUJebQdDAnWuaQ2ep6LlbYg8U9JI7pf3Q1IQ399mInrHT_qlD7V1kuvDa9lhZ8q_3FhjVgz4H0bWXmHWT1b4uhw8_Tn60ViQFXVfGr8QcID4SLWcIl1ZF4h_2340AkkBDxlmQOA%3D%3D)

Because gun violence is a mental health issue. ** **[](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=1f6435b928144d32a5f1ad5d3ed2e036&_e=brbUxD9lwAgtYv_LCFSNG5Jbt818Ie6E9dOxnsrqSymIPccdIIDklE_sP-1rCAXpjPA4yKJ9DP3z4fxeg83xV9o25qq1iCUsVydzCmtNIH5a5G4lX60lL1RV-PVsSYbRirKn9jSH4ujdiH7XzQ2U3whWLoBV7YosHluYaxnoPHb7VNARX8m14auVdbvxMqt5Xg0uuM3sd-L2hSyOWjOMBRVKN6FkSIZSezqZ5BntKMvKHhMXilt59Q2mIo3cFSvBgmNeI2eW1kuK5w2410LipdksxCPk5q6eCMYOPepjCotf1hjAQhlQWeqWTzB_KOJ8j-zHWYB6-qhae-HTrwvGZQ%3D%3D)

Because gun violence is a women's issue. ** [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=1f6435b928144d32a5f1ad5d3ed2e036&_e=brbUxD9lwAgtYv_LCFSNG5Jbt818Ie6E9dOxnsrqSymIPccdIIDklE_sP-1rCAXpjPA4yKJ9DP3z4fxeg83xV9o25qq1iCUsVydzCmtNIH5a5G4lX60lL1RV-PVsSYbRZxQWb0RuiaunKNSmePv3lLRgWYQm01vQUaEClmaKG5vL2S3gQ-LDZVnvHsViDww3d6DBNDMIZgGI_Jklu5OQPyiyaZG6LesGF4lL_FGFom_Qu2djFeH-xHntycdiYAPlCiTcYkAWauD8BSWI-gY2fJM4qOJ1E8jYjLmgAmKh7tgXchAJ_s4hsIOnSfvkA7WRI3MSm1ZWWcUjk9nw1a5m-Q%3D%3D) We need your help to raise awareness about the effects of gun violence. You can start by wearing orange tomorrow -- and sharing with your networks using the hashtag #wearorange.

But don't stop there. Here are some other ways you can help: **[Support community organizations](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=1f6435b928144d32a5f1ad5d3ed2e036&_e=brbUxD9lwAgtYv_LCFSNG1YwX5b3F8VeUVNSrpkKoP1DxrgUdJFwxojmKDk0s-XP4pKqZkmnPOena84vgVRC6WP1o2QtwnAwaDIEZ87gqnUBy73WOLxBOSutZdr_bQ0kjAxHkIyXTA1B5zDeuHBMFb6qemgg6X4HnB5BeTT4pOvoOhz0i6XfGt08IasndZnL6wFlIAl1lz58xR_ATCmQ6dSr9uorTw1SWDPzoYr2tfxcKSADhnCgVDu4A8TvwfeySXjHejHSIT01ldZtVINVbOt0aXyHT4ZuX6oMK93VSZkJvTzBCkZlsLcDd-KzAeDTj96KPQx3BOxJnVk7s3D6-Jnc5mkBhdFDZYUNnE9VXDBuXiFnDbKhx32ELbjjBRKxCuJ0x6XsY9ujgjCq0QGjUGiMwki-3UBRiNCNQeng0AB9nwUNoWlHOazzz47PmW5A)**

**[Create your own #wearorange image](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=1f6435b928144d32a5f1ad5d3ed2e036&_e=brbUxD9lwAgtYv_LCFSNG_uRiX8B_wx9HNPoaINJKXfuNXqWVftdbBnbHGDsQQw7DWCk7QmYfgoUemn5WK9gN4kwGoszVNoTVVzxXp3Zua4kg99jWAGeHq0g9AucHFxwJabbgHn7RwpaowFVV96AGFFotyBfs6eKM0eftVJE72p43D_vg2llwpQSVCmc32JDCPyb_2CThizkSf3EkIPCoSCkjHnEo8I5ipNSO1jZKndYLlOaPFSOXOlBXmNnm0aoY3ntmt1Krr3DHE6PJBPLBTMrPKR_13UOESCpTSYvGoNVyrqeNX1MAz0gMtHgU4vnCeaXpCEYI2-6l4YaC_wXTYuxwAGXe98HGPbQ9FMx_rw%3D)**
**[Download a virtual meeting background](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=1f6435b928144d32a5f1ad5d3ed2e036&_e=brbUxD9lwAgtYv_LCFSNG_uRiX8B_wx9HNPoaINJKXdlBVwRfJKaFEuemyb9sD-UC8Jx4veeNLEYoivtBg1RCb41L7zYsYa4YxH0DRse2-AgXoXjJVM6R_q1TpKJ3ivM3WQKo3befbrICxr0aM7rIv82kAuhhBNxGXHxEPtAtAkocbICyfn5eheR944zdPdDn1IaMlafugSx-PGYhVps2fhsL2TfQ2jhnOYogsH_NyGqrar9v9oLyaBF9S8OYjbrzMEBHUyaBsL3HqLpeBrPNGxvlHEsoVda3kb9qKVaqEYeF8Ifcrc4zpGM062zs3xAk-yxjRUWypKGrOXrGxdIHA%3D%3D)**
Visit the Wear Orange site to find out more about National Gun Violence Day and how we can come together to raise awareness and work together to save lives:

**[https://wearorange.org/](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=1f6435b928144d32a5f1ad5d3ed2e036&_e=brbUxD9lwAgtYv_LCFSNG5Jbt818Ie6E9dOxnsrqSymIPccdIIDklE_sP-1rCAXpjPA4yKJ9DP3z4fxeg83xV9o25qq1iCUsVydzCmtNIH5a5G4lX60lL1RV-PVsSYbRB_kuUxTwRPGAM8nzaDh1O3x5u_UDsrJsGAOK40P8fDYibVIyTP6lZodJ-GJtt8glLPfeJvKI4_sMNVnweZ9nZf2xaSzHlr79aS7rXlFb0CHhBRzeLE5FUBy7NDywluXwMlwXHDAxkHymWSwhcDANWdybKyxeByTnjfZnZ2kL9TVyi04Fyt9RFhRSqi1a2uytkKeddb1dQVA9H4GBrgIIHw%3D%3D)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bret=20Richards?=
subject: Thank You All
body:
We came up short, but what brought us together remains true: Iowa neighbors get more things done in our small towns than politicians have in decades.

http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=5f5f1514e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-5f5f1514e7-25822489

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aKSmPLb_cL8&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=5f5f1514e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-5f5f1514e7-25822489

https://www.facebook.com/BretRichards4Congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=5f5f1514e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-5f5f1514e7-25822489
https://twitter.com/Richards4Iowa?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=5f5f1514e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-5f5f1514e7-25822489
https://www.instagram.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=5f5f1514e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-5f5f1514e7-25822489
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCWoK8_dK_O4JOjCtLkZKF9w?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=5f5f1514e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-5f5f1514e7-25822489
http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=5f5f1514e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-5f5f1514e7-25822489
Hello

Tuesday's results weren't what we had hoped, but they shouldn't leave you discouraged. We didn't win this time, but the promise for a better future, a better Congress, and a better rural Iowa lives on.

I want to say thank you to everyone that worked so hard on this campaign. In a district this large, it takes so many volunteers to make an impact. In the video above, I tried to thank everyone I could knowing I would miss far too many. If I missed you in the moment, you were in good company. I even forgot to thank my mom and dad. Thank you for everything.

I'll always be a Hawkeye at heart (which I'm sure cost us 15 points in Ames) so I hold dear the sayings of the late, great Hayden Fry. And on this occasion, one of his stands out: "Playing the game with integrity -- that's what it's all about".

I'm proud of the campaign we ran. One that inspired thousands of Iowans to vote for change, for a government not of our betters but of our peers. One that connected with Iowans where they were from county fairs to fire stations to Pizza Ranches and their front doors steps. One that I believe represented Iowa values well.

To me, that's what politics should be: talking with your neighbor about what we've got to change. Campaigns should be fueled from the bottom-up, listening to the regular people who know best how to solve our biggest problems. Those connections forge the bonds that start a movement towards the America we want to see.

I congratulate Senator Feenstra on his victory at the polls and look forward to his service to the Fourth District. But remember that elections and politicians are only one way we can change the course of our culture and our nation. Stay vigilant and involved because Iowa is the conscience of our country, and our communities and values are too important to simply watch fade away.

We started a conversation and the fire still burns hot. As always, you can reach me at (712) 579-4753. Let's keep that fire kindled and the conversation going.

Your neighbor,

============================================================

If I missed you in the moment, you were in good company. I even forgot to thank my mom and dad. Thank you for everything. I'll always be a Hawkeye at heart (which I'm sure cost us 15 points in Ames) so I hold dear the sayings of the late, great Hayden Fry. And on this occasion, one of his stands out: "Playing the game with integrity -- that's what it's all about". I'm proud of the campaign we ran. One that inspired thousands of Iowans to vote for change, for a government not of our betters but of our peers. One that connected with Iowans where they were from county fairs to fire stations to Pizza Ranches and their front doors steps. One that I believe represented Iowa values well. To me, that's what politics should be: talking with your neighbor about what we've got to change. Campaigns should be fueled from the bottom-up, listening to the regular people who know best how to solve our biggest problems. Those connections forge the bonds that start a movement towards the America we want to see. I congratulate Senator Feenstra on his victory at the polls and look forward to his service to the Fourth District. But remember that elections and politicians are only one way we can change the course of our culture and our nation. Stay vigilant and involved because Iowa is the conscience of our country, and our communities and values are too important to simply watch fade away. We started a conversation and the fire still burns hot. As always, you can reach me at (712) 579-4753. Let's keep that fire kindled and the conversation going. Your neighbor, ============================================================ Copyright © 2019 Richards For Congress, All rights reserved. You signed up to receive this message at an event, on Facebook, or through our website. Bret Richards is a former member of the United States Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. Our mailing address is: Richards For Congress P.O. Box 293 Irwin, Iowa 51446-0293 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can update your preferences () or unsubscribe from this list () .

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Not just reopening, but rebuilding our healthcare system
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Every Rhode Islanders deserves access to high-quality health care. That's always been my belief, and I'm proud of the work we've done in Rhode Island to lower the cost of insurance. But the virus has also illuminated many of the inequities in healthcare access and outcomes that have persisted for decades. We can't accept this. As we begin to recover as a state from the COVID-19 pandemic, we must rebuild our health care system and make it stronger.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DjPaOPCvQE6J8ugVEMmWSLP-WwCVMIPcKFV7DFAFOn0ZU31eHx0BZW3d03KB4qABwmzCY4GYSWpN9USHY-QUQz_BDtYQL5xVEllyQXQBa_ZSszwbAYhq4sR166ykk6KssVXyRXaLk52XL0Yzibir6JqGBXqpKh4S3s48YqaRfGRzJi2QB_wjbEt5ZfR-kCz949XlAIzEEIAdoqUkwdg58Wd022zTv_fS&c=r__fzfvJp14Ph7joZpfASgEdoZvL0WFqSV673OXHTMwN68dywLRFQw==&ch=yJmonj3x3Xg0wITsVPMByQvwL9KTmMyH610uDFj8sXxSZ78DK2CzfA==)
---
| Luckily for us here in Rhode Island, we're fully committed this work. Together with a group of stakeholders, we've built a long-term health plan focused on improving health in Rhode Island, and today I will be signing an executive order affirming our commitment to this work over the long haul.
I also want to share with you a few of the things that we are doing immediately to shore up our healthcare system:

* Last week, we launched a hospital relief fund to help hospitals offset immediate costs and prepare for the future.

* We've taken great strides to expand access to telehealth since the start of this pandemic. I have extended that executive order for another 30 days to July 5. This access is critical in this crisis, but it's also helping to break down barriers to healthcare access across our state. We need to work to make these expansions permanent, and I'm committed to working with the General Assembly do so here in Rhode Island.

---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DjPaOPCvQE6J8ugVEMmWSLP-WwCVMIPcKFV7DFAFOn0ZU31eHx0BZeaqYrTHtdJgYonvSWv-VQ5uN0cDlTJFQGsb1XjfvDdURn3NLS17btvclR0gjumavNl94Zh4YBVZufiVz4Us2WLOeNwo_qKqwUT3oNOECE7M7pmHQVYiYpsI-qQeMjHjm_kVhVRHIKEu2ZmPu3K0QW0=&c=r__fzfvJp14Ph7joZpfASgEdoZvL0WFqSV673OXHTMwN68dywLRFQw==&ch=yJmonj3x3Xg0wITsVPMByQvwL9KTmMyH610uDFj8sXxSZ78DK2CzfA==)
---
| To stay up to date with Rhode Island's latest COVID-19 statistics, please check the Department of Health's [new data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DjPaOPCvQE6J8ugVEMmWSLP-WwCVMIPcKFV7DFAFOn0ZU31eHx0BZeaqYrTHtdJgYonvSWv-VQ5uN0cDlTJFQGsb1XjfvDdURn3NLS17btvclR0gjumavNl94Zh4YBVZufiVz4Us2WLOeNwo_qKqwUT3oNOECE7M7pmHQVYiYpsI-qQeMjHjm_kVhVRHIKEu2ZmPu3K0QW0=&c=r__fzfvJp14Ph7joZpfASgEdoZvL0WFqSV673OXHTMwN68dywLRFQw==&ch=yJmonj3x3Xg0wITsVPMByQvwL9KTmMyH610uDFj8sXxSZ78DK2CzfA==) for all the information you need about the spread of coronavirus in Rhode Island.
---
| In the coming days, I'll be back to share more about additional investments we'll be making in our health equity zones, primary care providers and other critical areas of our health system. Our work is just beginning.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DjPaOPCvQE6J8ugVEMmWSLP-WwCVMIPcKFV7DFAFOn0ZU31eHx0BZW3d03KB4qABqx-XCUcCPUkOEl98yY_6OaWFg5aPgULt6-IjlZ2ZS16k1FTv8ip-2v4FLLoYGXQtQUgLzYTBRspZ4IqwEDkJ0fFsEW2yBmu5sSoXgA4pD4DN9xfjRcHeETMjpc6oCAEPk132SsMU-FA9UrndFufOR6uJBi2CXgXJ858czMFxQw8KkhjISBsd-yIyS1t_kRAETpjJ5JWXYA4388iSUzwFabBk3mR-U7wRCkpzJLzPKo2IVzLjI_uc6tRoO9xD34rs3ciMOlFut8U=&c=r__fzfvJp14Ph7joZpfASgEdoZvL0WFqSV673OXHTMwN68dywLRFQw==&ch=yJmonj3x3Xg0wITsVPMByQvwL9KTmMyH610uDFj8sXxSZ78DK2CzfA==).
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---

Please contribute $45 or more by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to activate your membership and we’ll send you your PERSONALIZED certificate. >> CONTRIBUTE $75 CONTRIBUTE $65 CONTRIBUTE $55 CONTRIBUTE $45 CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT As an Official 2020 Trump Executive Member: - You’ll get PRIORITY-ACCESS to limited-edition Trump Gear - My team will come to you FIRST with key campaign strategy decisions - And lastly, you’ll go down in history as one of the Patriots who won us the 2020 Election.My team is finalizing the membership roster TOMORROW and I’ll be looking for your name. Please make a contribution of $45 TODAY to become a Trump Executive Member and to get on the roster my team gives me. Thank you, Donald J. Dear Friend, President Trump could have acted swiftly to contain the COVID-19 pandemic. He could have developed a national test/trace/isolate capability to contain the outbreak and facilitate a faster economic recovery. He could have united the country behind that plan and cemented his re-election. Instead, he chose to ignore the threat. Today, we're still seeing ~20,000 new infections and about 1,000 deaths every day. There's still no plan, and there's no end in sight. And Trump and his enablers are not only pretending it isn't happening, they're pretending it never happened. President Trump could have used the death of George Floyd to open a dialogue on race, policing, and our criminal justice system. Instead, he had federal law enforcement use chemical irritants, flash-bangs, and brute force on peaceful protesters to clear a path for him to a local church for an awkward photo-op. The whole thing looked like it was staged by Leni Riefenstahl. In both cases, Trump could have chosen facts, dialogue, and unification to guide the nation through the crisis. In both, he chose ignorance, propaganda, and divisiveness. And my Republican opponents are backing him 100%. Trump and my opponents have made their choice clear - rather than unifying this divided country and guiding us out of crisis, they choose to perpetuate the divisive rhetoric and policies that got us here in the first place. **[Demand Better, Demand Change by pitching in now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17754237/205313617/-1907457919?refcode=053020_line&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTBkMWQ0YS0yZWE3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BNJheH8jO3njQDL2vPaf43W-d_Onc1b3aIfD7c7ogcM=). ** _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_ | **[$10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17754238/205313618/1282705599?refcode=06052020_abx1&amount=10&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTBkMWQ0YS0yZWE3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BNJheH8jO3njQDL2vPaf43W-d_Onc1b3aIfD7c7ogcM=)** | **[$25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17754239/205313619/1282705599?refcode=06052020_abx2&amount=25&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTBkMWQ0YS0yZWE3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BNJheH8jO3njQDL2vPaf43W-d_Onc1b3aIfD7c7ogcM=)** | **[$50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17754240/205313620/1282705599?refcode=06052020_abx3&amount=50&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTBkMWQ0YS0yZWE3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BNJheH8jO3njQDL2vPaf43W-d_Onc1b3aIfD7c7ogcM=)**

name: MAGASOTA
subject: MAGASOTA Freedom and Liberty 2020
body:
| Peter -- Hopefully all is well with you. When we began composing this message several weeks ago, our intent was to focus on the MAGASOTA campaign and Covid-19. Literally, hours before sending it out, everything changed as the George Floyd news erupted. Now the pandemic seems irrelevant, although the unconstitutional lockdown of our state is still very real. Although every election is very important, the most important election of our lifetime is just five months away. We must make it count, and it is imperative that we stop the increasingly dangerous agenda of the progressive elites. The 2020 MAGASOTA Freedom and Liberty campaign was ready to launch April 1st. Unfortunately, Covid-19 outbreak set us back. We considered covering campaign issues such as immigration, health care, and the soaring Trump economy. But at the end of the day, we zeroed in on the two ideals that we believe most Americans cherish - freedom and liberty. And to preserve these ideals in America, the campaign for President Trump must move forward. President Donald Trump has weathered many storms: fake Russian collusion, illegitimate impeachment, an invisible enemy that destroyed the greatest economy we’ve had in a long time, and now a very divided nation. We know that when he is re-elected, the leftists will continue with their mission to undermine him at every step in order to advance their destructive agenda. His policies threaten their agenda, and they will not give up. We must not give up either. We must stand with our President and fight back! Next week we will be hosting the first MAGASOTA meet up since the Covid-19 outbreak. It will be held in Prior Lake on June 9th from 7:00 to 8:00 p.m., and the maximum number of attendees is 30. Thus, you must call 952-818-9555 to reserve your seat. To advance the MAGASOTA campaign for our President, please follow us on twitter and Facebook. We need to put a heavy emphasis on this now, as we fear that our sites may be shut down due to our support of the President. To spread the message, we ask that you not only like our content and make comments, but that you also share our posts. Our goal is to reach 1000 shares a day. Sharing spreads the message. Please help us. Much is at stake. If we want to keep the America we love, we need to protect the integrity of this upcoming election. We cannot give the leftists any opportunity to question election results. It is imperative that we turn out in masses and re-elect President Trump by a margin that will not stand for any of their shenanigans! Encourage everyone you know to get involved and to vote. Please call 952-818-9555 to reserve your seat for the MAGASOTA June 9th meetup. -Michele Even

MAGASOTA
[http://www.magasota.com/](http://www.magasota.com/?e=ae7c075f3228267010e570c56948845c&utm_source=magasota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=magasota&n=1)
---
-=-=- MAGASOTA · MN 55372, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.magasota.com/unsubscribe?e=ae7c075f3228267010e570c56948845c&utm_source=magasota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=magasota&n=2). -=-=-
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.magasota.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=ae7c075f3228267010e570c56948845c&utm_source=magasota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=magasota&n=3), software for leaders.

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: The Real Election Interference
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pQvhQHJ-R1S1fDhSKw9Yi8nl31jApYNZnxXDkhih7MXngSHxlT4PtOsMlWxOLlEnGJqRB4Z0fXE_WjCIJr178VIrUs4Dn1rmIsWTA6032e4fRQ9vx-CRU9kEyfRG_UUB5P9t4ESdJPESB_D3nOssfAO-Js8_NEIzmcNva3AJzqhTt0TRiEv7zg==&c=ei1-pqan-IFw0qwG1tlJ_ZTX6mpY5mrxsuv16BkUqvjEhuav94mqLg==&ch=AZU3hJKbQ4TRVNJUhSYk1TcYqTX9ZOl65ev7kMkiJ3gLCXOEBWsuOA==)
---
| Patriot,
For over three years, we heard from the Left and the mainstream media that Russia was to blame for election interference. Talking heads clutched their pearls and told us that our democracy was under attack.
But the real election interference is happening right now on Twitter. They have intentionally silenced conservatives in the past, and now they are going after President Trump.
That is why I am filing an FEC complaint against Twitter. If they are going to regulate speech on their platform, then they deserve to be held accountable.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pQvhQHJ-R1S1fDhSKw9Yi8nl31jApYNZnxXDkhih7MXngSHxlT4PtOsMlWxOLlEnGJqRB4Z0fXE_WjCIJr178VIrUs4Dn1rmIsWTA6032e4fRQ9vx-CRU9kEyfRG_UUB5P9t4ESdJPESB_D3nOssfAO-Js8_NEIzmcNva3AJzqhTt0TRiEv7zg==&c=ei1-pqan-IFw0qwG1tlJ_ZTX6mpY5mrxsuv16BkUqvjEhuav94mqLg==&ch=AZU3hJKbQ4TRVNJUhSYk1TcYqTX9ZOl65ev7kMkiJ3gLCXOEBWsuOA==)
---
| I'm counting on you to [stand with me](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pQvhQHJ-R1S1fDhSKw9Yi8nl31jApYNZnxXDkhih7MXngSHxlT4PtOsMlWxOLlEnGJqRB4Z0fXE_WjCIJr178VIrUs4Dn1rmIsWTA6032e4fRQ9vx-CRU9kEyfRG_UUB5P9t4ESdJPESB_D3nOssfAO-Js8_NEIzmcNva3AJzqhTt0TRiEv7zg==&c=ei1-pqan-IFw0qwG1tlJ_ZTX6mpY5mrxsuv16BkUqvjEhuav94mqLg==&ch=AZU3hJKbQ4TRVNJUhSYk1TcYqTX9ZOl65ev7kMkiJ3gLCXOEBWsuOA==) as I take on the Big Tech companies who want to use their power to influence our democracy. I am the only incumbent Republican who has sworn off corporate PAC money, so I cannot be "bought" like so many others in Washington. Will you chip in and support me as I take on these far-left tech giant companies?
---
| | | [STAND WITH MATT GAETZ AS HE TAKES ON BIG TECH](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pQvhQHJ-R1S1fDhSKw9Yi8nl31jApYNZnxXDkhih7MXngSHxlT4PtOsMlWxOLlEnGJqRB4Z0fXE_WjCIJr178VIrUs4Dn1rmIsWTA6032e4fRQ9vx-CRU9kEyfRG_UUB5P9t4ESdJPESB_D3nOssfAO-Js8_NEIzmcNva3AJzqhTt0TRiEv7zg==&c=ei1-pqan-IFw0qwG1tlJ_ZTX6mpY5mrxsuv16BkUqvjEhuav94mqLg==&ch=AZU3hJKbQ4TRVNJUhSYk1TcYqTX9ZOl65ev7kMkiJ3gLCXOEBWsuOA==)
---
| Thank you for supporting this cause.
God bless America,
---
|

| Matt Gaetz

Peter,

MJ's next debate is coming up quick, and she's so excited to talk about all the issues that matter in this election:

* Expanding and improving our health care
* Ending the gun violence epidemic
* Combating climate change
* And so much more!

But in order to reach all the undecided voters it's going to take to win this race, we've set a goal of raising $20,000 before MJ takes the stage on Saturday -- and we need your help to get there!
**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890013/7f51f7bc/4eced035/4ef687f0/3844512122/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1MDUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoffdebate?refcode=email_20200605.1nd__1505__&amount=10")**

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Did You See This?
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=help_run_commercial_retarget&n=1)
---
Peter -- **Action 4 Liberty is about to spend big bucks on this commercial statewide...** [](http://www.action4liberty.com/recall_walz_commercial?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=help_run_commercial_retarget&n=2) Every week that Walz' illegal shutdown continues, we lose more of our beloved restaurants, bars, resorts, gyms and hair salons. And the more people out of work, the more unrest we're likely to encounter anytime things go sideways in the process of seeking justice for George Floyd. What is Walz waiting for? Wisconsin has been open for 3 weeks and there's no spike in COVID related deaths. Even Michigan's leftist governor opened up her state after making her constituents suffer for months. The Legislature convenes next week, but we have very low confidence that they are going to do what's needed to End Walz' Illegal Emergency Powers. So we are putting the fate of Minnesota in the hands of the People...where it belongs! **Action 4 Liberty is going to run[this commercial](http://www.action4liberty.com/recall_walz_commercial?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=help_run_commercial_retarget&n=3) across Minnesota on streaming services like Hulu and YouTubeTv. It will cost us a lot of money, but the mission is important. If we want to Recall Walz, we must get the message out.** Help us get this commercial out to hundreds of thousands of Minnesotans by donating today. | [](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=help_run_commercial_retarget&n=4 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=help_run_commercial_retarget&n=5)
---
We must put the pressure on Walz now! Who knows what next week has in store for our suffering state under Walz' failed leadership.
**[Please help us with a contribution of $25, $50, $100, $250, or get us a lot of air play with a donation of $1,000](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=help_run_commercial_retarget&n=6).**
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=help_run_commercial_retarget&n=7).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=help_run_commercial_retarget&n=8).
Created with [NationBuilder](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=help_run_commercial_retarget&n=9), software for leaders.

name: Mary Mancini
subject: TNDP Weekly Recap: When we organize, we win
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/tndp-long-%20fo%20newsletter.jpg]
Dear Peter,
‘I will never understand’ is not enough.
We must gain understanding of systemic racism and the power structures that exist in this country - the same systemic racism and power structures that continue to destroy and take the lives of unarmed innocent Black people. By learning more, we gain the understanding necessary to fight these injustices.
‘I see you” is not enough.
Passive bystanderism is costly and deadly to those who need active help. Rather than just seeing need, we must step in and meet it head on. We can do this by protesting, actively engaging, marching, and speaking up, calling out racism whenever we see it. Standing with the Black community does more than just seeing it.
‘All Lives Matter’ is not enough.
It is impossible for all lives to matter until Black Lives Matter. These are the lives that are lost daily in a manner no others are. This is the moment we are facing. We must confront this truth if we are ever to save those Black lives.
Promoting patience is not enough.
Justice delayed is justice denied. The Black community has waited far too long for justice, and we must meet that demand now. This is a time for action, not patience.
Saying their names is not enough.
We cannot just say the names of George Floyd, Breonna Taylor, and Daniel Hambirck and the countless others and call it activism. We must condemn their deaths, honor their memory, and uphold their fight by making sure no more names are added to the list of Black people murdered by police violence.
Boycotting businesses that stay quiet is not enough.
Shop, dine, and support Black business and restaurants. Many Black owned businesses suffer from gentrification and large corporations driving them out or taking their business. Find them in your city, take your friends, be a regular.
Social Media activism is not enough.
To cause change, we must empower our citizens with their fundamental rights. We must make sure that their vote is protected and that they are protected when they vote with access to absentee voting, abolishing all Voter ID laws, identifying and ending modern day voter suppression, and ensuring all Tennesseans have access to their polling locations during early vote and on Election Day, despite job schedules.
Anti-Trump sentiment is not enough.
Leadership matters. Governing matters. Donate, organize, volunteer, and elect candidates who are committed to fighting injustices with meaningful legislation and undoing harmful legislation. Run for office when no candidate is promising these changes. Uplift and encourage Black and other candidates of color to represent districts that have no representation of minority populations. Call your local officials and demand change in your cities, counties, and state.
Enough is enough.
The Tennessee Democratic Party stands with all organizations and people who seek to dismantle the racist systems that destroy too many lives. If any Tennessean wants to stand with us but does not know where to begin, find the black (or other minority-led) organization(s) in your community who are on the ground organizing and taking action on issues of racism, inequality, and injustice. Find the leaders of these organizations and then allow them to tell you what they need you to do to help. Then listen.
Fighting for justice, The Tennessee Democratic Party Team
Mary Mancini, Chair
Kris Murphy, Executive Director
Julio Salazar, Data Administrator
Sandra Sepulveda, Finance & Operations Director
Maria Brewer, Party Affairs Director
Evan Latt, Political Director
Emily Cupples, Communications Director

JUDGE OVERRULES GOV. BILL LEE
AND REPUBLICANS IN VICTORY
FOR DEMOCRACY
Thousands signed our petition for no excuse absentee ballots. Hundreds of Tennesseans called their legislator. Dozens of bills proposed by Tennessee Senate Democratic Caucus and Tennessee House Democratic Caucus. Bill Lee and Tennessee Republican Party ignored all pleas by Tennesseans and all recommendations by the CDC. The following Democrats from Memphis Hunter Demster, Earle J. Fisher, UP THE VOTE 901, and Allison Donald filed a bi-partisan suit with Republicans demanding Tennessee offer health protection during the 2020 election. On Thursday afternoon, a Judge overruled Governor Bill Lee and Tennessee Republican Legislators to mandate a no excuse absentee ballot measure. [https://tennesseelookout.com/2020/06/04/breaking-judge-strikes-down-tn-limits-on-absentee-voting-due-to-pandemic/?fbclid=IwAR3w-ilMDoTRxyUqjdIKWE4J0Jo5Np-Uf_jwLUI61DMYpIFBoXPnAS1L5tg]
When we organize and stand for what are our rights, we can win. When we partner with the other side and stop with harmful party politics, we can exponentially improve lives in Tennessee. TNDP thanks for all the hard work each and every Tennesseean did to make this happen.

TENNESSEE IS IN THE MIDDLE OF A
HEALTH CRISIS AND REPUBLICANS ONCE
AGAIN REFUSE TO EXPAND
1 in every 10 Tennesseans is without health insurance. More than 675,000 Tennesseans live without health insurance. 91.1% of said uninsured are black, brown, or members of a minority community.24,375 cases of COVID-19 and 381 deaths.Senator Jeff Yarbro put forth two separate bills on expanding TennCare coverage. Yet, in the middle of a pandemic, the following seven Republicans killed the bill:
*
Joey Hensley
Rusty Crowe
Ed Jackson
Bo Watson
Shane Reeves
Becky Massey
Ferrel Haile

The killing of black and brown people doesn't only happen in the streets at the hands of police. It happens through policies and governing. Leadership matters. Check your voter registration now! [https://tnmap.tn.gov/voterlookup/]

DONALD TRUMP WREAKS
HAVOC ON AMERICA
You saw them video this week. You know, the video of the President of the United States unleashing the military on his own people all for an awkared publicity stunt. What President Trump did is what dictators do. It made us sick to our stomach, but, we won't let it distract us from his total lack of leadership through COVID-19.
This week's jobs report released unemployment at 13.3% - this is the highest it has ever been since the Great Depression. Both African American unemployment is 16.8% and Hispanic unemployment is 17.6% — near record highs and still far higher than the 12.4% rate for white Americans. Our economy was so vulnerable because of three years of Trump's failed economic leadership.
*
Trump promised that China would make more than $200 billion in additional purchases of U.S. goods, but that’s nowhere close to happening. In fact, U.S. exports are still far lower than before Trump’s trade war.

In 2019, manufacturing was in a recession, farmers were struggling under Trump’s reckless trade policies, and the retail industry cut 75,000 jobs.

Trump’s tax bill allowed the 400 wealthiest Americans to pay a lower tax rate than all other Americans for the first time ever.

Trump promised corporations would raise workers’ wages, but instead they spent money from his tax cuts on stock buybacks for their wealthy shareholders.

SLAY THE DRAGON MOVIE SCREENING
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/p17064731_v_v8_aa.jpg]
As another round of redistricting approaches in Tennessee, the TNDP is hosting a virtual movie screening of SLAY THE DRAGON, a new and timely documentary film about gerrymandering in the United States. We will watch the film together and then following the film there will be a panel discussion with the directors and other special guests.
Learn more and purchase your ticket now! [https://www.facebook.com/events/597710474436463/]

TWEETS OF THE WEEK
https://www.facebook.com/GlennFor10/photos/a.129225968644390/155041649396155/?type=1&theater [https://www.facebook.com/GlennFor10/photos/a.129225968644390/155041649396155/?type=1&theater]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Screen%20Shot%202020-06-05%20at%2011.42.46%20AM.png]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Screen%20Shot%202020-06-05%20at%209.58.46%20AM.png]

COCKTAILS AND QUESTIONS WITH
TNDP CHAIRWOMAN MARY MANCINI
AND MATT FERRY
CANDIDATE FOR HOUSE DISTRICT 48
https://www.facebook.com/tndem/videos/2607420502865124/ [https://www.facebook.com/tndem/videos/2607420502865124/]
This week's Cocktails and Questions was a sit down with TNDP Chairwoman Mary Mancini and Matt Ferry. Matt is running for TN House District 48. Learn more about [https://www.facebook.com/tndem/videos/2607420502865124/] Matt's campaign priorities! [https://www.facebook.com/tndem/videos/2607420502865124/]
Cocktails and Questions is weekly happy hour, happens every Thursday at 4:00 pm CT/ 5:00 pm ET on Facebook live. Each week we sit down with Democratic candidates on the 2020 ballot to discuss current issues, their platform, and their campaigns.

THANK YOU...
Last Sunday, our chairwoman, Mary Mancini would have normally asked for help reaching our end of month fundraising goal. She would have mentioned our progress, how much we needed to close the gap, then asked for a contribution.
None of that was necessary because of the generosity of one man, Bill Freeman. You know Bill because of his unyielding commitment to electing Democrats and his many contributions to Democratic candidates and progressive organizations throughout the years. Last month, he generously contributed our ENTIRE goal in response to a fundraising email. We are so grateful for his contribution, giving us the resources we need to keep fighting to elect more Democrats at every level of government. Thank you so very much, Bill!
As excited as we are, fundraising remains critical in order to take on the GOP. With your help, we can keep up the momentum that Bill so generously jump-started. With all the injustice and lack of leadership we’re seeing from Republicans, supporting Democrats has never been more important.
Will you consider donating today? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/oNKhpMgsTk-zA4pXE2fn4w2]
PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR. GEETA MCMILLAN, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE.
Tennessee Democratic Party
319 Plus Park Blvd
Nashville, TN 37217
United States

name: Team Fair Fight Action
subject: Information on voting in the June 9 primary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa46e/34a064cc/1b89e92c/7028a25/4274472356/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Hi Friend, _" Every night for more than a week, we have witnessed the anguish and anger of demonstrators protesting an unjust criminal justice system... To say that the answer is to go cast a ballot feels not just inadequate, but disrespectful. 'Go vote' sounds like a slogan, not a solution. Because millions of us have voted. And too many still die. The moment requires many things of each one of us... Voting is a first step in a long and complex process, tedious but vital. You can have a car with all the bells and whistles, but if it doesn't have wheels, you can't move forward. So we have to talk about the whole process, and we cannot be so simplistic that we seem too idealistic... Protest to demand attention to the wrenching pain of systemic injustice. Vote because we deserve leaders who see us, who hear us and who are willing to act on our demands. Voting will not save us from harm, but silence will surely damn us all."_ _\--Stacey Abrams,[6/4/2020](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa46e/34a064cc/1b89e92c/7028a22/4274472356/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.nytimes.com/2020/06/04/opinion/stacey-abrams-voting-floyd-protests.html")_ Election Day in Georgia is Tuesday, June 9. We want to make sure you're ready to make your voice heard. **Received your absentee ballot?** Absentee ballots must be received by your county Elections Office by 7:00 PM on June 9. If you haven't returned your absentee ballot yet, complete it and deliver it to your county Elections Office or a drop box. [Click here to find your county elections office and drop box locations.](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa46e/34a064cc/1b89e92c/7028a23/4274472356/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.georgiademocrat.org/vote/find-my-countys-ballot-drop-boxes/") **Requested your absentee ballot but haven 't received it? **We want to hear from you. Please call the Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816 to get help, and then [click here to fill out this form](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa46e/34a064cc/1b89e92c/7028a20/4274472356/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://forms.gle/fSL7T781SAk5a8RKA") to tell us your story. **Want to vote early?** Today, Friday June 5, is the last day to vote early. [Click here to find early voting locations and times for your county.](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa46e/34a064cc/1b89e92c/7028a21/4274472356/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.georgiademocrat.org/vote/june-9-primary-early-voting/") **Voting on Election Day, June 9?** The polls will be open from 7:00 AM through 7:00 PM. To find your voting location, call the Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816. If you have any questions or need any help voting, please call the Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816. Thank you for making your voice heard in this moment. Fair Fight Action

clean_body: | "" | | | Hi Friend, " Every night for more than a week, we have witnessed the anguish and anger of demonstrators protesting an unjust criminal justice system... To say that the answer is to go cast a ballot feels not just inadequate, but disrespectful. 'Go vote' sounds like a slogan, not a solution. Because millions of us have voted. And too many still die. The moment requires many things of each one of us... Voting is a first step in a long and complex process, tedious but vital. You can have a car with all the bells and whistles, but if it doesn't have wheels, you can't move forward. So we have to talk about the whole process, and we cannot be so simplistic that we seem too idealistic... Protest to demand attention to the wrenching pain of systemic injustice. Vote because we deserve leaders who see us, who hear us and who are willing to act on our demands. Voting will not save us from harm, but silence will surely damn us all." \--Stacey Abrams, "" Election Day in Georgia is Tuesday, June 9. We want to make sure you're ready to make your voice heard. Received your absentee ballot? Absentee ballots must be received by your county Elections Office by 7:00 PM on June 9. If you haven't returned your absentee ballot yet, complete it and deliver it to your county Elections Office or a drop box. "" Requested your absentee ballot but haven 't received it? We want to hear from you. Please call the Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816 to get help, and then "" to tell us your story. Want to vote early? Today, Friday June 5, is the last day to vote early. "" Voting on Election Day, June 9? The polls will be open from 7:00 AM through 7:00 PM. To find your voting location, call the Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816. If you have any questions or need any help voting, please call the Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816. Thank you for making your voice heard in this moment. Our Republican opponent - unelected Sen. Kelly Loeffler - has spent her entire career serving corporations and special interests instead of working people. We're building a coalition of working people from all over Georgia to fight for a brighter, fairer future for ALL, not just the lucky few. But we won't win without your input, friends.

name: Margaret Good
subject: Making sure you have this information:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
And despite what the fear-mongering GOP would have you believe, voting by mail is safe and easy.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17759823/205413763/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTQ4MGU1YS01MmE3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_D8ghTIcKxtwtzmG4nWSFeK9r7CJrZ1YGtnjzQi4kx4=&emci=ba683a92-42a7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=f9480e5a-52a7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644) Hi there,

Thanks to so many of you who let us know your plans to vote by mail!

No one should have to choose between casting their ballot and their personal health.

And despite what the fear-mongering GOP would have you believe, voting by mail is safe and easy.

So, if you have been thinking about how to cast your ballot by mail but you’re not sure where to start, below is some information to help you get the process started. | [Click here for information on Sarasota County »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17759824/205413764/950515561?op=lookup&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTQ4MGU1YS01MmE3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_D8ghTIcKxtwtzmG4nWSFeK9r7CJrZ1YGtnjzQi4kx4=&emci=ba683a92-42a7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=f9480e5a-52a7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644)
---
[Click here for information on Manatee County »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17759825/205413765/-197326395?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTQ4MGU1YS01MmE3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_D8ghTIcKxtwtzmG4nWSFeK9r7CJrZ1YGtnjzQi4kx4=&emci=ba683a92-42a7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=f9480e5a-52a7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644)
[Click here for information on Hillsborough County »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17759826/205413766/-1594794888?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTQ4MGU1YS01MmE3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_D8ghTIcKxtwtzmG4nWSFeK9r7CJrZ1YGtnjzQi4kx4=&emci=ba683a92-42a7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=f9480e5a-52a7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644)
We want to ensure that everyone who can vote does vote in this election.

It’s not only critical to my race and the future of this district, but the votes we need to flip Florida’s 16th _will_ allow the Democrats to take back Florida in November.

Thank you,

Margaret

**[P.S. Thank you for helping to keep your friends and family safe! Please forward this along to anyone who you think should know about vote-by-mail, and if you’re not in Sarasota, Manatee, or Hillsborough County, click here for more information about vote-by-mail where you live.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17759827/205413767/-1384241047?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTQ4MGU1YS01MmE3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_D8ghTIcKxtwtzmG4nWSFeK9r7CJrZ1YGtnjzQi4kx4=&emci=ba683a92-42a7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=f9480e5a-52a7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644)**
| Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. _We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us._

Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our campaign has taken a pledge to reject corporate PAC money and is instead funded by thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our community and across our country. **[If you'd like to donate, click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17759828/205413768/788213855?refcode=emfooter&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTQ4MGU1YS01MmE3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_D8ghTIcKxtwtzmG4nWSFeK9r7CJrZ1YGtnjzQi4kx4=)**

If you’d like to volunteer, **[click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17759829/205413769/192916899?contactdata=xnYWvHmiP3sHhIKHO%2FFmfWHx%2FvILlZ1116bc%2F5agiGcf21RHx09ez0cqE3eows8V&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTQ4MGU1YS01MmE3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_D8ghTIcKxtwtzmG4nWSFeK9r7CJrZ1YGtnjzQi4kx4=&emci=ba683a92-42a7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=f9480e5a-52a7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644)**

If you’d like to unsubscribe, we hate to see you go, but click here to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/ba683a92-42a7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74/f9480e5a-52a7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTQ4MGU1YS01MmE3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_D8ghTIcKxtwtzmG4nWSFeK9r7CJrZ1YGtnjzQi4kx4=&id=113801977) .

Margaret Good for Congress

body:
During her run for Congress, Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez famously said that people like her “aren’t supposed to run for office.” I felt that. | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/1wA/ni0YAA/t.32d/WY9dOfU0QpG7qy-kteSjEA/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJulx2QbEciYFAbGthJiPfEa776fd7iFF41aZnfnLTTFyX0ZwVOeaeiBYuQuy1g3hn-2FqNCnc2GC4Ds4465MQfM8NjIJjAwRqq5ty-2Fo1uoPSdnHucrrcIeyWRcXfPnhs1rH6m3RlPGrNzeT0V57TD2W7TJ-2BGIIwyOp4NZOhoDsl2v-2FLAcK-2BBIMAIRR-2BiNYxe5Sq-2Fc-2B4KzAHb7qp8qNJBTGRRV-2BxZZFd4S6Ma7e-2FDFQmjtyvTo2i4Xm71SoMWzfaLj6SktnhluQVvWCBJE7RQI2Yy5jFkqlps8awsmes32Yrz222-2Bm9OBkZQWrnakKDah2yc-3D/RZys) Friend, **** **** **** During her run for Congress, Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez famously said that people like her “aren’t supposed to run for office.” I felt that. Growing up poor, black, and gay, I never imagined that someone like me could run for Congress, much less come this close to winning.
But Rep. Ocasio-Cortez has changed that impression for so many people who wonder if there is a place for them in a world filled with so much injustice. We need more people in Congress like her, who understand, through their lived experiences, the urgency of racial justice and economic fairness.
It’s an absolute honor to receive her endorsement in our fight to deliver true justice and equality for the people of New York’s 17th Congressional District and across this nation. I can’t wait to work with Rep. Ocasio-Cortez to pass long overdue bills like Medicare for All, the Green New Deal for Public Housing Act, and the Recognizing Poverty Act.
Like Rep. Ocasio-Cortez, I am funding my race the right way. No corporate PACs. No fossil fuel industry lobbyists. No self-funding. Just people.
**_[That’s why I need you to chip in.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/1wA/ni0YAA/t.32d/WY9dOfU0QpG7qy-kteSjEA/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJulx2QbEciYFAbGthJiPfEa776fd7iFF41aZnfnLTTF1ZgUOAaL5hhRI8V0ovsks4skiiFAXM3BEijEBuhgb2rhWklxIfoLxacHsTHrvmvMs6o7i1PWsxOvTdGYHTKnQxG3g1nqj2OJlJpJvv5GWjdgahbTtzNF7M9ULIw7yd-2BUsxdYcedzWm8z6fDleD2gc6jE-2BhXB9A0bdX3OAcCDi7HH-2F9x8cYJ5WrGu0XLLipqgvcOL-2F0icE5kEH7OAyFlVTDtFUJiRSwXWKO9cWzPGwquTzA-2BZisVmadznHJH-2FwU6-2FwLUhADNJ95M9mNIRGggT6c-3D/xo8c)_** **_[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/1wA/ni0YAA/t.32d/WY9dOfU0QpG7qy-kteSjEA/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJiXG-2FNFtAG6J2VX7uCG-2BvLOjLp58evr6w91cZBSP3C68-2FmDjQ-2F-2FO-2FypM3bsjHbTX0syMGnme-2FlUzzGLqfclkg3788tYnEOkMnJqfX-2FvlUIyu02aPfP-2FJJZ5c3zXi81VQUqMc4fh-2BCrIgI9wZPWpEKjUcNiv2e20aF-2F6Igqe7onNfx4VT4pokSnQZHFniGsNw6pGmO1QSXPi8eaxl-2FqkwodAvB1zntmjmkSlmu9or1UihTemHoJXTorVSeLYI58IB8ik1mtSfFbY4MG3SY-2FC91X0bpWHSdw3TiyLrKC394PnTvXR2ElKKvsI-2FRkZ4-2BQw-2F8-3D/QAFT)_**

clean_body: During her run for Congress, Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez famously said that people like her “aren’t supposed to run for office.” I felt that. | | | Friend, ** During her run for Congress, Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez famously said that people like her “aren’t supposed to run for office.” I felt that. Growing up poor, black, and gay, I never imagined that someone like me could run for Congress, much less come this close to winning. But Rep. Ocasio-Cortez has changed that impression for so many people who wonder if there is a place for them in a world filled with so much injustice. We need more people in Congress like her, who understand, through their lived experiences, the urgency of racial justice and economic fairness. It’s an absolute honor to receive her endorsement in our fight to deliver true justice and equality for the people of New York’s 17th Congressional District and across this nation. I can’t wait to work with Rep. Ocasio-Cortez to pass long overdue bills like Medicare for All, the Green New Deal for Public Housing Act, and the Recognizing Poverty Act. Like Rep. Ocasio-Cortez, I am funding my race the right way. No corporate PACs. No fossil fuel industry lobbyists. No self-funding. Just people. Rep. Ocasio-Cortez shows us what a young person of color from a working-class background can do for working people in the halls of power. I’m running for Congress to give her some backup. And I need your help. ** Together, we’re going to win this. Mondaire | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Our mailing address is: Mondaire for Congress P.O. Box 933, Nyack, NY 10960 | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Mondaire for Congress, please .

name: John Cornyn
subject: BREAKING: Texas a Toss-Up?
body:
Friend, I wanted to reach out to you, specifically, to make sure you saw the news. I know I can trust you to respond to numbers like these.
A new poll shows President Trump neck-and-neck with Joe Biden here in Texas.
And when I say neck-and-neck, I really mean it. Just ONE PERCENTAGE POINT separates our president from Joe Biden.
The worst part? Members of the media are even calling the Lone Star State a TOSS UP.
Friend, it's moments like these when I am really counting on a swift response from you. This is TEXAS we're talking about we CAN'T let Joe Biden overtake President Trump in OUR state!
**[I'm counting on immediate action from you to help me DEFEND TRUMP here in Texas. They're going to see vulnerability in Texas.
And they're going to come down harder than they have ever before.

We'd be proud to have you join us. Thank you for all you do to support John Cornyn for Senate.
