name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Urgent request: Sign this letter to President Trump!
body:
| |
---
I have an urgent request for you today. **Would you please consider [adding your name to a letter to President Trump and Vice President Pence](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTU3LTc2NmFjOTVlNWFhZDQxOTliODZiMWUzNTBmZjI2ZDY0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTZGlBSnJCUjUyQXo4SDJWM2QxSVNDZWo4REZLWmFFajNQZmVvdzBaal9DX2dQRWJBL3ZpZXdmb3JtP21pZD00MjE0MCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=ukVILDn24pSWRm7uyNkqug) asking for the CDC to revise and redraft the guidelines for opening schools?** In Georgia and other states in the southeast, school usually starts the first week in August. School boards are already meeting to figure out how to reopen. It is time-sensitive for these school boards to have updated guidance. **The text of the letter is below my signature.** This letter will be a letter from physicians, teachers, group leaders, parents, grandparents, activists, and others.

If you are willing to sign the letter to the President asking the CDC to revise the school reopening guidelines, please [use this form to sign the letter](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTU3LTc2NmFjOTVlNWFhZDQxOTliODZiMWUzNTBmZjI2ZDY0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTZGlBSnJCUjUyQXo4SDJWM2QxSVNDZWo4REZLWmFFajNQZmVvdzBaal9DX2dQRWJBL3ZpZXdmb3JtP21pZD00MjE0MCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=y6rL3tkfF75fQeKmtDQSSQ).

_**Additionally, please forward this email to anyone you think would want to sign the letter and copy and paste the email and letter along with the link to sign it on social media.**_ The letter is from physicians, teachers, group leaders, parents, grandparents, activists, and others.

If you haven’t seen the CDC guidelines for reopening schools, you can view them on the [CDC website](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTU3LTc2NmFjOTVlNWFhZDQxOTliODZiMWUzNTBmZjI2ZDY0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY2RjLmdvdi9jb3JvbmF2aXJ1cy8yMDE5LW5jb3YvY29tbXVuaXR5L3NjaG9vbHMtY2hpbGRjYXJlL3NjaG9vbHMuaHRtbD9taWQ9NDIxNDAmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=e4cJX0N1pdLIDbsESzvcjg).

Thank you!

Jenny Beth Martin
**LETTER TO PRESIDENT TRUMP AND VICE PRESIDENT PENCE**
On May 19, the CDC issued a new document, “Considerations for Schools,” offering what it calls “considerations for ways in which schools can help protect students, teachers, administrators, and staff and slow the spread of COVID-19.” We have reviewed these “considerations,” and find them wholly out of touch with the way people live in the real world that is America in 2020. They are totally unworkable, and we urge senior officials to review and revise these new CDC “considerations” to bring them into line with how real people live.

To begin, acknowledge that schools are one of the fundamental bedrocks of our society. They educate our next generation, not just on the basics of reading, writing, and arithmetic, but on the shared values that inhere in our culture. They prepare our next generation to be productive members of society – a society that will not always allow for social distancing, staggered scheduling, herding into small groups, and the like. The real world can be a rough place, and we do our children a disservice if we fail to properly prepare them for it.

Moreover, for most working parents with children in school, school is not just about education. Having children in school means a parent can go to work secure in the knowledge that his or her child or children are in a safe place, overseen by responsible adults, while they’re at work. And for some, it even means the knowledge that their child or children will be eating well, thanks to our school nutrition programs.

Consequently, keeping schools closed is simply not an option. Schools must reopen in the fall – and they must reopen in a manner that acknowledges all we’ve learned about COVID-19. That means taking into account what is reasonable to expect of children of school age, and not assuming it is in their nature to behave in as regimented a manner as the authors of the CDC “considerations” seem to think possible.

In fact, the CDC “considerations” seem so strange, it’s as if they were written by a technocrat in Washington, DC who’s never seen children in a school setting before. You’re going to enforce social distancing on a playground or in gym class? Impossible. You’re going to order children not to use the jungle gyms, the slides, the horizontal ladders, and the carousels, because they cannot be disinfected between each use? And we are expected to believe this will succeed without the use of force? Try telling a nine-year-old he can’t climb on the horizontal ladders, or a five-year-old she can’t use the slide. Good luck with that.

The CDC’s guidelines stipulate reconfiguring classrooms so each child faces forward, eliminating most face-to-face contact. This mandate is straight out of a dystopian science fiction novel. In fact, one doctor has commented to that effect. Dr. Jane Hughes in San Antonio, Texas, believes the CDC recommendations create a “dystopian environment for our children,” far more devastating than the low risk posed by COVID-19 to young people. ([youtu.be/dIcrmYdwn8A](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTU3LTc2NmFjOTVlNWFhZDQxOTliODZiMWUzNTBmZjI2ZDY0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9kSWNybVlkd244QT9taWQ9NDIxNDAmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=lk4Yoqf8kqcza5sXlmkjUw) and [youtu.be/tMpOv9LAq3E](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTU3LTc2NmFjOTVlNWFhZDQxOTliODZiMWUzNTBmZjI2ZDY0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS90TXBPdjlMQXEzRT9taWQ9NDIxNDAmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=kWc5zQeb-td_J0HaW0Uc5A))

Speaking of that low risk to young people, what is most troubling is that the “considerations” are not anchored in science. They seem not have considered that the virus simply is not very much of a threat to young people under the age of 25, and certainly not a threat to children under the age of 15.

Further, we find it disturbing that at a time of budget shortfalls at the state and local levels, implementing the CDC “considerations” would require significant new and additional spending. We’ve already significantly increased government spending – and the concomitant burden on taxpayers – beyond reason as a function of governments’ lockdown responses and the resulting shock to our economy.

Perhaps most disturbingly, the CDC “considerations” do not acknowledge the CDC’s own updated findings that say the virus spreads mainly from person to person, rather than from contaminated surfaces. Does the CDC even read its own ever-changing guidelines and findings? If the CDC isn’t paying attention to what it releases to the public, why should we?

The CDC considerations further demonstrate a lack of real-world understanding in the section on masks. “Teach and reinforce use of cloth face coverings. ... Face coverings should be worn by staff and students (particularly older students) as feasible, and are most essential in times when physical distancing is difficult. Individuals should be frequently reminded not to touch the face covering and to wash their hands frequently. Information should be provided to staff, students, and students’ families on proper use, removal, and washing of cloth face coverings.”

This insistence on masks flies in the face of data, science, and common sense. A study that appeared in _The New England Journal of Medicine_ on May 21st reports that masks provide “little, if any, protection from infection.” Furthermore, the possibility of “catching COVID-19 from a passing interaction in a public space is therefore minimal.” So, why the insistence on masks? The article provides this explanation: “In many cases, the desire for widespread masking is a reflexive reaction to anxiety over the pandemic.”1

So, to be clear: We are asking that our children be forced to cover their faces for up to eight hours a day simply because the CDC has so frightened us that there is now a prevalent and “reflexive reaction to anxiety” during this time? Surely our children deserve better than anxiety-induced reflexive, rather than thoughtful, reactions.

At this point, the United States is far behind our European counterparts. Not only did our children here have to forego classroom instruction for the last three months of the school year and skip graduation ceremonies, but we hear from school districts across the nation that, guided by the CDC’s unrealistic guidelines, they are not even sure schools can resume in the fall. This is nonsense, and Europe proves it. Schools will not only be open in Europe in the fall, but, recognizing that school attendance is foundational to a functioning society, many European countries reopened their schools.2 Given what we know about the low infection rates among children, it is hardly surprising that these countries have found zero increase in the spread of infection as a result of the schools being reopened.

Doctors have spoken out on the dangers of the extended lockdowns, and, in particular, their effect on children of school age. Said Dr. Jeffrey Kornitzer a pediatric neurologist from New Jersey, “Just today, I saw a child paralyzed with fear because he couldn’t figure out if he should wear his mask because his mother kept saying, ‘Well, if you don’t wear the mask, you’re going to catch coronavirus and you’re gonna die,’ and at the same time the kid has sensory issues, every time he put it on he wanted to crawl out of his skin.” ([youtu.be/usRD4QIjSNM](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTU3LTc2NmFjOTVlNWFhZDQxOTliODZiMWUzNTBmZjI2ZDY0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS91c1JENFFJalNOTT9taWQ9NDIxNDAmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=_ceXo9GycjGX1oSFcjpL9g))

And Dr. Mark McDonald, a child, adolescent, and adult psychiatrist in Los Angeles, says, “The risk of death in children from flu, from seasonal flu, is 20 to 30 times higher than that of the coronavirus, and yet we have never closed schools, we have never asked children or teachers to wear masks, to play separately, to eat separately, to arrive and leave separately from schools because of the flu. And now we’re doing that for the coronavirus, which, essentially, does not affect children ... In my opinion, this is child abuse. I am absolutely appalled, and I think it makes no scientific or rational sense whatsoever.” ([youtu.be/tTi8Wn_NiOg](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTU3LTc2NmFjOTVlNWFhZDQxOTliODZiMWUzNTBmZjI2ZDY0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS90VGk4V25fTmlPZz9taWQ9NDIxNDAmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=QCz6D2avvmm0GBTgUApwkQ))

We agree. The CDC “considerations” are entirely inappropriate, and must be rewritten from top to bottom.
|
---
[1] Michael Klompas, M.D., M.P.H., Charles A. Morris, M.D., M.P.H., Julia Sinclair, M.B.A., Madelyn Pearson, D.N.P., R.N., and Erica S. Shenoy, M.D., Ph.D., “Universal Masking in Hospitals in the Covid-19 Era,” The New England Journal of Medicine, 21 May 2020. [https://www.nejm.org/doi/full/10.1056/NEJMp2006372](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTU3LTc2NmFjOTVlNWFhZDQxOTliODZiMWUzNTBmZjI2ZDY0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmVqbS5vcmcvZG9pL2Z1bGwvMTAuMTA1Ni9ORUpNcDIwMDYzNzI_bWlkPTQyMTQwJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=Jrab3muNzuoiXTtP0NIssg)

[2] Bojan Pancevski and Naja Dandanell, “Is it safe to reopen schools? These countries say yes,” The Wall Street Journal, 31 May 2020. [https://www.wsj.com/articles/is-it-safe-to-reopen-schools-these-countries-say-yes-11590928949](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTU3LTc2NmFjOTVlNWFhZDQxOTliODZiMWUzNTBmZjI2ZDY0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud3NqLmNvbS9hcnRpY2xlcy9pcy1pdC1zYWZlLXRvLXJlb3Blbi1zY2hvb2xzLXRoZXNlLWNvdW50cmllcy1zYXkteWVzLTExNTkwOTI4OTQ5P21pZD00MjE0MCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=uuC3zfkXE2onHE7hSHbA5w)
[ CONTRIBUTE ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTU3LTc2NmFjOTVlNWFhZDQxOTliODZiMWUzNTBmZjI2ZDY0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90c2FjdGlvbi5vcmcvZG9uYXRlLz9taWQ9NDIxNDAmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=uZDNIE3aIRL-C7Lhmi9dmQ)
|
---

( and ) Speaking of that low risk to young people, what is most troubling is that the “considerations” are not anchored in science. They seem not have considered that the virus simply is not very much of a threat to young people under the age of 25, and certainly not a threat to children under the age of 15. Further, we find it disturbing that at a time of budget shortfalls at the state and local levels, implementing the CDC “considerations” would require significant new and additional spending. We’ve already significantly increased government spending – and the concomitant burden on taxpayers – beyond reason as a function of governments’ lockdown responses and the resulting shock to our economy. Perhaps most disturbingly, the CDC “considerations” do not acknowledge the CDC’s own updated findings that say the virus spreads mainly from person to person, rather than from contaminated surfaces. Does the CDC even read its own ever-changing guidelines and findings? If the CDC isn’t paying attention to what it releases to the public, why should we? The CDC considerations further demonstrate a lack of real-world understanding in the section on masks. “Teach and reinforce use of cloth face coverings. ... Face coverings should be worn by staff and students (particularly older students) as feasible, and are most essential in times when physical distancing is difficult. Individuals should be frequently reminded not to touch the face covering and to wash their hands frequently. Information should be provided to staff, students, and students’ families on proper use, removal, and washing of cloth face coverings.” This insistence on masks flies in the face of data, science, and common sense. A study that appeared in The New England Journal of Medicine on May 21st reports that masks provide “little, if any, protection from infection.” Furthermore, the possibility of “catching COVID-19 from a passing interaction in a public space is therefore minimal.” So, why the insistence on masks? The article provides this explanation: “In many cases, the desire for widespread masking is a reflexive reaction to anxiety over the pandemic.”1 So, to be clear: We are asking that our children be forced to cover their faces for up to eight hours a day simply because the CDC has so frightened us that there is now a prevalent and “reflexive reaction to anxiety” during this time? Surely our children deserve better than anxiety-induced reflexive, rather than thoughtful, reactions. At this point, the United States is far behind our European counterparts. Not only did our children here have to forego classroom instruction for the last three months of the school year and skip graduation ceremonies, but we hear from school districts across the nation that, guided by the CDC’s unrealistic guidelines, they are not even sure schools can resume in the fall. This is nonsense, and Europe proves it. Schools will not only be open in Europe in the fall, but, recognizing that school attendance is foundational to a functioning society, many European countries reopened their schools.2 Given what we know about the low infection rates among children, it is hardly surprising that these countries have found zero increase in the spread of infection as a result of the schools being reopened. Doctors have spoken out on the dangers of the extended lockdowns, and, in particular, their effect on children of school age. Said Dr. Jeffrey Kornitzer a pediatric neurologist from New Jersey, “Just today, I saw a child paralyzed with fear because he couldn’t figure out if he should wear his mask because his mother kept saying, ‘Well, if you don’t wear the mask, you’re going to catch coronavirus and you’re gonna die,’ and at the same time the kid has sensory issues, every time he put it on he wanted to crawl out of his skin.” () And Dr. Mark McDonald, a child, adolescent, and adult psychiatrist in Los Angeles, says, “The risk of death in children from flu, from seasonal flu, is 20 to 30 times higher than that of the coronavirus, and yet we have never closed schools, we have never asked children or teachers to wear masks, to play separately, to eat separately, to arrive and leave separately from schools because of the flu. And now we’re doing that for the coronavirus, which, essentially, does not affect children ... In my opinion, this is child abuse. I am absolutely appalled, and I think it makes no scientific or rational sense whatsoever.” () We agree. The CDC “considerations” are entirely inappropriate, and must be rewritten from top to bottom. | [1] Michael Klompas, M.D., M.P.H., Charles A. Morris, M.D., M.P.H., Julia Sinclair, M.B.A., Madelyn Pearson, D.N.P., R.N., and Erica S. Shenoy, M.D., Ph.D., “Universal Masking in Hospitals in the Covid-19 Era,” The New England Journal of Medicine, 21 May 2020. [2] Bojan Pancevski and Naja Dandanell, “Is it safe to reopen schools? These countries say yes,” The Wall Street Journal, 31 May 2020. | Tea Party Patriots Action operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. © 2020 80 M St SE, First Floor, Washington, D.C. 20003 |

name: NH Beer Caucus
subject: You're invited to the Fourth Beer Caucus Happy Hour!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee** 10 Water Street, Concord
body:
| |
---
Derek, please join us:
Two top contenders for the Republican nomination for a New Hampshire Congressional seat will virtually meet face to face on Monday evening, June 8 when they join the founders of the Legislative Beer Caucus for a zoom meeting forum.
Matt Mayberry and Matt Mowers are hoping to replace Manchester Democrat Chris Pappas as Congressman for New Hampshire's Congressional District 1.
This is the latest is a series of Beer Caucus “Happy Hours” where members chat with public figures over libations about various contemporary issues. Earlier sessions have included candidates Don Bolduc and Corky Messner, National GOP Committeeman Chris Ager, Senate Republican Leader Chuck Morse, and House Republican leader Dick Hinch, among others.
The June 8 event commences at 8 p.m. EDT. The public is welcome to join in and registration access available: [https://us02web.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZEud-mtqTIqHtzd50loq61OX4h6tVLPG8pW](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDM2OTk5MDczNDk5NDUyNTAzJmM9aTB6NSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNTU2Mjc2NTQmZD1nOGEybjZy._lbonwYwI8o7YZR0r_eKEnWm5NyrQycHMJh17-AZass)
Contact Rep Lang if you have questions or concerns.

Sincerely,
Rep Tim Lang - (R-Sanbornton) cell [603-566-9802](tel:603-566-9802) for any questions.
Rep Reed Panasiti - (R - Amherst)
Rep Howard Pearl - (R - Loudon)
Hon Michael Moffett - (R- Loudon)
**
****Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee** 10 Water Street, Concord
New Hampshire 03301 United States You received this email because you signed up on our website or made a purchase from us.

name: Jim Banks
subject: ANTIFA Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JIM BANKS FOR CONGRESS, INC
body:
Friends, Just this week, President Trump designated ANTIFA as a domestic terrorist group. After their destructive behavior this week, it’s time to hold them accountable. I fully support President Trump’s decision to call-out this dangerous group. I called for FBI Director, Christopher Wray, to put ANTIFA on a list of extremist ideologies in 2019, _and that didn’t happen._ Now we see President Trump clearly leading our nation and labeling them a domestic terrorist organization himself. **[Can you add your name to thank President Trump for his leadership in protecting our nation?>>>](http://links.jimbanks.us/u/click?_t=14b4f09b550c426eb4f913b115f47659&_m=7c57152f48014de08f4da17b996281d9&_e=gZZJez3pySXyXU-DjXCt6m1asAvijDqbyD5wWUQKaCiIU0fJHn589VnL4W8VbqgMlsplsiH9NTdFY0mZpHb4QvSdDRxJLGrzJpO3Atazb3RaQ45ryyFMZNmRpWcnt_KcTibM7fXKnJl-DsMak9IgXoPwc_mjLsapwz7mvRYy_-IFiqckrkoj96Y0q_FPHHpJqqd3KjO0f8dQkS02i4GkBeoHkJcKJr3IF4cD4gLUykmXKNhT71SGxRCa6RZ_g3B5hMkxMdco0vKI61S0bb7u9eIjstyhFZKRoRe40Ei4XAQOBOU-eMW6QD7n5IjVZX-NIlpXv2nAVwmBFXQESXtwnUKhUiHKWIVOImtN3G_ln4e_VCA7Yc55Vi3nNUloAfz3dlwlvWxdVA6Z32FDmFklKDj3dNHU5ilv4hhLUSenwg0RIX52A0zAWWpprjtGSCAk)** President Trump took decisive action to stop the rioting by ordering ANTIFA be rightfully labeled a terrorist organization while calling for peace. | | **-June 5, 2020-** **-BLACK LIVES MATTER-** **** The murder of George Floyd is undoubtedly on all of our hearts and minds. Sadly, George Floyd is just one example in the long list of unarmed Black Americans killed by law enforcement officers. Hoosiers and Americans are rightfully angry. Angry because the cycle of injustice lurches on and voices who have over and over called for change have gone unheard. Angry because righteous protests have been expropriated by forces that seek to divide us and destroy the livelihoods of our neighbors. We cannot allow people of color to be marginalized and erased if we truly seek to achieve a more perfect union. That responsibility is with all of us. It starts with speaking up. The time for silence has passed. _**[Sign on to our petition to fight for justice for Black Americans.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17762402/205465446/-1118395748?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGJkOTUyYy02N2E3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k5scZvO99KpFI4vPY6OduH63PJQN8PpPri1ocFrAW7Q=&emci=50a80776-34a7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=a0bd952c-67a7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=4925535)**_ **-The 2020 Primary Election-** **** On Tuesday, Hoosiers cast their ballots in the 2020 primary election! We're going into the 2020 election with a diverse bench ready to fight for Hoosiers. In every corner of the state, Dems are running to bring positive change to their communities. Fight out who is running in your area [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17762403/205465447/-845839532?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGJkOTUyYy02N2E3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k5scZvO99KpFI4vPY6OduH63PJQN8PpPri1ocFrAW7Q=&emci=50a80776-34a7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=a0bd952c-67a7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=4925535). The historic election was Indiana's first-ever opportunity to let all registered voters vote by mail, regardless of reason. Hundreds of thousands of Hoosiers voted by mail. Three in every five vote-by-mail applications were for Democratic ballots. To Democrats, this election was more than just a response to the pandemic; it was a step toward making Indiana's elections more convenient and inclusive. And we're fighting to bring the success of voting by mail to the 2020 general election. We've [called on the election commission](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17762404/205465448/-558856140?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGJkOTUyYy02N2E3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k5scZvO99KpFI4vPY6OduH63PJQN8PpPri1ocFrAW7Q=&emci=50a80776-34a7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=a0bd952c-67a7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=4925535) to extend no-fault absentee voting to the general election because every Hoosier deserves to vote safely and conveniently. **-The 2020 Virtual State Convention-** **** Tomorrow, Saturday, June 6, we are officially gaveling our [2020 Virtual State Convention](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17762405/205465449/1567825957?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGJkOTUyYy02N2E3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k5scZvO99KpFI4vPY6OduH63PJQN8PpPri1ocFrAW7Q=&emci=50a80776-34a7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=a0bd952c-67a7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=4925535) to order to discuss Convention logistics and make announcements. Join us on [Facebook Live](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17762406/205465450/1943329205?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGJkOTUyYy02N2E3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k5scZvO99KpFI4vPY6OduH63PJQN8PpPri1ocFrAW7Q=&emci=50a80776-34a7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=a0bd952c-67a7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=4925535) to watch! Stay tuned all next week for Virtual State Convention activities coming to you, and check out our [2020 Convention Program](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17762407/205465451/204070709?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGJkOTUyYy02N2E3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k5scZvO99KpFI4vPY6OduH63PJQN8PpPri1ocFrAW7Q=&emci=50a80776-34a7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=a0bd952c-67a7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=4925535) for dates and times! The 2020 State Convention is where we'll vote on the party platform and nominate our Lieutenant Governor and Attorney General candidates as well as our national delegates! It's an essential step in the biggest election of our lives and we're hoping you'll join us, virtually! **-The 2020 Hoosier Hospitality Dinner-** [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17762408/205465452/-1853952297?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGJkOTUyYy02N2E3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k5scZvO99KpFI4vPY6OduH63PJQN8PpPri1ocFrAW7Q=&emci=50a80776-34a7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=a0bd952c-67a7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=4925535) We're taking our [Hoosier Hospitality Dinner](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17762409/205465453/-1853952297?emci=5650e39e-b7a1-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=%7B%7BContactsEmailID%7D%7D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGJkOTUyYy02N2E3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k5scZvO99KpFI4vPY6OduH63PJQN8PpPri1ocFrAW7Q=) online and we want you to come with us! 2020 is the most important election of our lives. Health care, teacher pay, voting rights, and equality are all on the ballot. It's time to come together and get to work. That's why we're hoping you'll join us at the [2020 Hoosier Hospitality Dinner](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17762410/205465454/-1853952297?emci=5650e39e-b7a1-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=%7B%7BContactsEmailID%7D%7D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGJkOTUyYy02N2E3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k5scZvO99KpFI4vPY6OduH63PJQN8PpPri1ocFrAW7Q=). This is an exclusive offer to hear from Democrats across the country. Plus, this year's speaker will be DCCC chair, Illinois Congresswoman Cheri Bustos! Cheri made history as the first woman elected to Congress in her district. Now, she's joining us in the fight to take back our nation in 2020. You won't want to miss this! More info and tickets [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17762411/205465455/-1853952297?emci=5650e39e-b7a1-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=%7B%7BContactsEmailID%7D%7D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGJkOTUyYy02N2E3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k5scZvO99KpFI4vPY6OduH63PJQN8PpPri1ocFrAW7Q=). **-The 2020 State Convention Preview-** **** Yesterday, we held kicked off our 2020 Virtual State Convention with the WISH-TV Convention Preview Broadcast. The broadcast signified the first time in Indiana's history that a political convention was broadcast on TV. The broadcast is just one way we're working to keep our 2020 State Convention open, inclusive, and safe. Candidates for Attorney General, Lieutenant Governor, and Governor shared their vision for a better Indiana. And Hoosiers leaders like Congressman André Carson, Mayor Joe Hogsett, Christina Hale, and former South Bend Mayor Pete Buttigieg reminded us of the importance of the 2020 Election. One thing is clear: Hoosier Democrats are ready to fight harder than ever before. You can watch The 2020 State Convention Preview in its entirety [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17762412/205465456/-421907845?v=254024932609926&ref=watch_permalink&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGJkOTUyYy02N2E3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k5scZvO99KpFI4vPY6OduH63PJQN8PpPri1ocFrAW7Q=&emci=50a80776-34a7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=a0bd952c-67a7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=4925535). clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | -June 5, 2020- -BLACK LIVES MATTER- ** The murder of George Floyd is undoubtedly on all of our hearts and minds. Sadly, George Floyd is just one example in the long list of unarmed Black Americans killed by law enforcement officers. Hoosiers and Americans are rightfully angry. Angry because the cycle of injustice lurches on and voices who have over and over called for change have gone unheard. Angry because righteous protests have been expropriated by forces that seek to divide us and destroy the livelihoods of our neighbors. We cannot allow people of color to be marginalized and erased if we truly seek to achieve a more perfect union. That responsibility is with all of us. It starts with speaking up. The time for silence has passed. -The 2020 Primary Election- On Tuesday, Hoosiers cast their ballots in the 2020 primary election! We're going into the 2020 election with a diverse bench ready to fight for Hoosiers. In every corner of the state, Dems are running to bring positive change to their communities. Fight out who is running in your area . The historic election was Indiana's first-ever opportunity to let all registered voters vote by mail, regardless of reason. Hundreds of thousands of Hoosiers voted by mail. Three in every five vote-by-mail applications were for Democratic ballots. To Democrats, this election was more than just a response to the pandemic; it was a step toward making Indiana's elections more convenient and inclusive. And we're fighting to bring the success of voting by mail to the 2020 general election. We've to extend no-fault absentee voting to the general election because every Hoosier deserves to vote safely and conveniently. -The 2020 Virtual State Convention- Tomorrow, Saturday, June 6, we are officially gaveling our to order to discuss Convention logistics and make announcements. Join us on to watch! Stay tuned all next week for Virtual State Convention activities coming to you, and check out our for dates and times! The 2020 State Convention is where we'll vote on the party platform and nominate our Lieutenant Governor and Attorney General candidates as well as our national delegates! It's an essential step in the biggest election of our lives and we're hoping you'll join us, virtually! -The 2020 Hoosier Hospitality Dinner- We're taking our = online and we want you to come with us! 2020 is the most important election of our lives. Health care, teacher pay, voting rights, and equality are all on the ballot. It's time to come together and get to work. That's why we're hoping you'll join us at the =. This is an exclusive offer to hear from Democrats across the country. Plus, this year's speaker will be DCCC chair, Illinois Congresswoman Cheri Bustos! Cheri made history as the first woman elected to Congress in her district. Now, she's joining us in the fight to take back our nation in 2020. You won't want to miss this! More info and tickets =. -The 2020 State Convention Preview- Yesterday, we held kicked off our 2020 Virtual State Convention with the WISH-TV Convention Preview Broadcast. The broadcast signified the first time in Indiana's history that a political convention was broadcast on TV. The broadcast is just one way we're working to keep our 2020 State Convention open, inclusive, and safe. Candidates for Attorney General, Lieutenant Governor, and Governor shared their vision for a better Indiana. And Hoosiers leaders like Congressman André Carson, Mayor Joe Hogsett, Christina Hale, and former South Bend Mayor Pete Buttigieg reminded us of the importance of the 2020 Election. One thing is clear: Hoosier Democrats are ready to fight harder than ever before. You can watch The 2020 State Convention Preview in its entirety . Text INDEMS to 66539 to find out how you can join the fight for 2020. -Resources- Looking for ways to receive or provide COVID-19 relief? We have created a running list of across our state . -Save the date- Porter County Dems: \- June 7, 8-11 AM EST, 429 County Rd 750 N., Valparaiso Kosciusko County Dems: \- June 8, 6:30-8:30 PM EST, 113 E Center St, Warsaw Citizens Action Coalition: \- June 8, 7-8:30 PM EST, Virtual Kosciusko County Dems: , June 8, 2020 6:30 PM - 9:00 PM EST, 113 E Center St, Warsaw Cass County Dems: \- June 9, 6-7 PM EST, Virtual Planned Parenthood Advocates of Indiana and Kentucky: \- June 11, 6-7 PM EST, Virtual Statewide: =\- June 12, 2020, Virtual Hoosier Environmental Council: \- June 12, All Day, Brown County State Park in Nashville, IN Indiana Stonewall Democrats: \- June 12, 7:30-9:30PM EST, Virtual Indiana Latino Democratic Caucus: \- June 12, 7:30-9:30PM EST, Virtual Statewide: =\- June 13, 2020, Virtual Wells County Dems: \- June 13th (2nd Saturday of every month), 119 S Johnson St., Bluffton Wayne County Dems: Monthly Meeting (no link) - June 17 (3rd Wednesday of every month), 1010 S 9th St., Richmond Tippecanoe County Dems: \[%7B%22surface%22%3A%22page%22%2C%22mechanism%22%3A%22mainlist%22%2C%22extradata%22%3A%22%5C%22\[\]%5C%22%22%7D\]%2C%22hassource%22%3Atrue%7D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGJkOTUyYy02N2E3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k5scZvO99KpFI4vPY6OduH63PJQN8PpPri1ocFrAW7Q=&emci=50a80776-34a7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=a0bd952c-67a7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=4925535 \- June 18th, 6:30-7:30 PM EDT, Virtual For more events check our events page =_. | ---|--- | | = | Connect With Us | | Indiana Democratic Party** 101 W. | Dear Friend,

We did it! We won the primary! The votes are still being counted, but we currently have 77% of the vote.

We couldn't be more proud of the efforts and dedication demonstrated by you, our team of grassroots volunteers and community supporters, and staff who shifted gears and put so much into new ways of voter outreach when COVID-19 struck, and all the world was changed. Because of your efforts, you have helped position us to defeat Jackie Walorski in November. With your help, we're going to take back Indiana’s 2nd Congressional District, and restore Dignity and Justice for All.

The work is only just beginning. As Richard Painter–George W. Bush's ethics lawyer–pointed out in his tweet above this morning, we need to send courageous leaders like Pat Hackett to Washington to call out the danger of the Trump/Barr alliance and to recommit as a nation to the rule of law.
[**Please, invest in our campaign to take back IN-02 and restore Dignity and Justice for All in Washington.**](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=9f8f2ac187&e=5886ca081d)

body:
Democrats just had their BEST DAY of fundraising in 2020, and it's clearer than ever before that Republicans are falling behind in the race for the Senate and the White House. We need to take drastic action if we're going to be able to close the fundraising gap and go toe to toe with Democrats across the country this fall.
**BREAKING: Democrats Raise $19 Million in a Single Day--SHATTERING 2020 Record**

This is bad, Friend.

_**Democrats just had their BEST DAY of fundraising in 2020**_ , and it's clearer than ever before that Republicans are falling behind in the race for the Senate and the White House.

We need to take drastic action if we're going to be able to close the fundraising gap and go toe to toe with Democrats across the country this fall, [_**which is why I 've set a goal of raising $250,000 before MIDNIGHT.**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OxwcpIdpcaGqK5PtjS6ANM36vrmLHA310f4PLJkNK_DyqZnN9o3ljNGQHNGwqntslGuLzmN4VoMBCgDUm6BAK7U0risdgFknRRQCM847t4ufaloP-bk1fpgFaTbq23rzSedGppOv4A4UKSyQvucKHnbUo6R9oJwQe2LuXYAJJQG5CB8ow8ucfcGdiHouI1bSOfe64_NDnnjUbK2ncjt_ARfbfAyFJ2k9NDBHp5Ci4GiSJmrU0uvDKhk3caDSmx7Pgd1kDzucrXv3mk59KFz1MrZCqCM6VQbRDKpYhicnkkUmGVMcen458kx1RE-dhDx0pwiUli0cZpN77-PcIKPimigIkESKl-8F_bF5ti1iohj3FqPBNvkQ4YhexkWdIhfxjprnmiu4A64=&c=yFjNcusex87DK4e_XcwSvQ96TsqXshKjkyvd5m-khlfAsA47SI11OQ==&ch=EhbSYjJ9j8k8uWLpQMpMBa2ltQtdi2TiIDoVJ1Sstae782KnwmmqHQ==)

name: Eugene DePasquale
subject: Thank you for all that you do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
Our campaign has been powered by this grassroots team, and your support is a key reason we won our primary election.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17763105/205483704/460726911?refcode=em_fr_2020.06.05_b1_ed_all-nd&refcode2=5dd0dace-6da7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGQwZGFjZS02ZGE3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0SKF8km_DnSz0EXMavkP2i-2iqQINRyox9PHdDItrdk=) _We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to._
Friend,

To everyone who has touched this campaign by volunteering to phone bank, text, or by donating: _Thank you for everything_. **Our campaign has been powered by this grassroots team, and your support is a key reason we won our primary election.** I’m so proud of the movement we’re building to bring real change to South Central Pennsylvania.

The past several days in our country have been extremely difficult. These incidents of police violence are happening far too often, and I sympathize with the pain, grief, and exhaustion communities of color are feeling right now. It’s more apparent than ever that we need elected leaders in our community who are dedicated to tackling the toughest issues among us.

Our team is ready to take on government dysfunction and ensure Washington actually works for all families, particularly when it comes to affordable healthcare, reviving and growing our economy, and tackling climate change.

As we look towards November, the race to represent PA-10 will be one of the most competitive races in the entire country. We have a real shot at flipping this seat blue, and we’re going to need this grassroots team on our side every step of the way between now and Election Day.

Thanks for all that you do,

Eugene | __Eugene DePasquale is running for Congress to represent Pennsylvania's 10th district. clean_body: Our campaign has been powered by this grassroots team, and your support is a key reason we won our primary election. = We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to. Friend, To everyone who has touched this campaign by volunteering to phone bank, text, or by donating: Thank you for everything. Our campaign has been powered by this grassroots team, and your support is a key reason we won our primary election. I’m so proud of the movement we’re building to bring real change to South Central Pennsylvania. The past several days in our country have been extremely difficult. These incidents of police violence are happening far too often, and I sympathize with the pain, grief, and exhaustion communities of color are feeling right now. It’s more apparent than ever that we need elected leaders in our community who are dedicated to tackling the toughest issues among us. Our team is ready to take on government dysfunction and ensure Washington actually works for all families, particularly when it comes to affordable healthcare, reviving and growing our economy, and tackling climate change. As we look towards November, the race to represent PA-10 will be one of the most competitive races in the entire country. We have a real shot at flipping this seat blue, and we’re going to need this grassroots team on our side every step of the way between now and Election Day. Thanks for all that you do, Eugene | Eugene DePasquale is running for Congress to represent Pennsylvania's 10th district. To learn more, please visit . Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates: This campaign is powered by people, not special interests. name: MJ Hegar
subject: Got my back?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
I'm going out on the debate stage on Saturday, and I just have one question -- do you have my back?

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489001e/7f51f7bc/4ec22151/4ef688d4/4198627220/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter,

I'm pumped to get out on the debate stage this Saturday! With so many undecided voters out there, I can't wait to talk about all the things that pushed me to run for Senate -- like combating climate change, improving our health care system, and ending gun violence.

I try to bring my A-game every day, but Saturday is an exciting opportunity to show people exactly why THIS campaign that we've built together is best positioned to take on Sen. Cornyn -- and I want to make y'all proud!

**Can I count on you for a momentum boost before this debate? My team tells me they set a goal of raising $20,000 before the debate begins, and I hope you can help us hit it!** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489001e/7f51f7bc/4ec22151/4ef688cc/4198627220/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1MDcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoffdebate?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200605.2nd__1507__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489001e/7f51f7bc/4ec22151/4ef688c2/4198627220/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1MDcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoffdebate?refcode=email_20200605.2nd__1507__")**
Let's go win this thing, y'all!

\-- MJ

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489001e/7f51f7bc/4ec22151/4ef688c0/4198627220/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1MDcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoffdebate?refcode=email_20200605.2nd__1507__&amount=10")**

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489001e/7f51f7bc/4ec22151/4ef688c6/4198627220/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1MDcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1507&amount=10")**

We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

name: Susan Collins
subject: We are being outraised
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
With only one month left of Q2, I must be completely honest with you: my opponent's Far Left allies are severely outraising us. On top of that, my campaign is not on track to reach our fundraising goals for the quarter. For my campaign's strategy to work, we must make June our most successful month to date.
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI2NjY0MjMS1&kn=5&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDQyNjU0NgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI2NjY0MjMS1&kn=9&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDQyNjU0NgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Dear Peter,
First and foremost, _thank you for everything._ My campaign depends on your unwavering support. Your commitment to this fight truly means the world.
With only one month left of Q2, I must be completely honest with you: **my opponent 's Far Left allies are severely outraising us.** On top of that, my campaign is not on track to reach our fundraising goals for the quarter. For my campaign's strategy to work, we must make June our most successful month to date.
So please, even when things get difficult, I need your help. This campaign only works with your support. You have shown the Far Left that we aren't afraid to fight back. And now more than ever, I need your support to remain strong.
I cannot say it enough -- thank you for everything. I will always fight for you and for what is right. Please stand with me in protecting Maine, the Senate, and our great country.
All my best,
Susan Collins

We're heading into the final weeks of this race with all of the momentum on our side, and I can't think of a better way to show how far we've come than by hitting the airwaves.

Our team is working to place **our new 30-second television ad during The Rachel Maddow Show this Tuesday, June 9th** \-- **[but we need to raise $10,000 between now and then to get it on the air. | _Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17763906/205498526/-466961882?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWQ0MDg1MC03NGE3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zaoqvHzCeoOSITG3CDwZN8zRuQNELlrLf_6plGQgTX8=&emci=f8b811ab-6ca7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=b1d40850-74a7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=14145524) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe._

* * *
Hi Friend,

Today we honor the life of Hadiya Pendleton and Breonna Taylor.

Hadiya’s bright young life was cut short at 15 years old, just one week after she performed at President Obama’s inauguration, because of a senseless act of gun violence.

Breonna was an aspiring nurse who was carelessly murdered in her own home by police due to a mistaken apartment address during a drug raid. Today would have been her 27th birthday.

_**Today, we wear Hadiya’s favorite color and observe what should have been Breonna’s birthday with a pledge to recommit ourselves to demanding an end to gun violence.**_ | [End Gun Violence ➜](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17763907/205498527/2030123129?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWQ0MDg1MC03NGE3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zaoqvHzCeoOSITG3CDwZN8zRuQNELlrLf_6plGQgTX8=&emci=f8b811ab-6ca7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=b1d40850-74a7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=14145524)
---
Friend, for too long, special interests and the NRA have tried to convince our country that commonsense gun safety reforms are unattainable. Sri doesn’t buy that, and it’s one of the many reasons he’s running to be our next congressman.

**Sri will fight for common sense background checks, red flag laws, locker laws, and getting guns out of the hands of violent criminals and domestic abusers.** His commitment to this issue is why our campaign is so proud to have the endorsements of former Congresswoman Gabby Giffords, The Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Moms Demand Action, and Everytown for Gun Safety.

[**We know Texas has an opportunity to lead the nation when it comes to responsible gun ownership and ending gun violence. Join us to help make it happen >> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17763908/205498528/2030123129?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWQ0MDg1MC03NGE3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zaoqvHzCeoOSITG3CDwZN8zRuQNELlrLf_6plGQgTX8=&emci=f8b811ab-6ca7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=b1d40850-74a7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=14145524) [Sign your name ➜](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17763909/205498529/2030123129?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWQ0MDg1MC03NGE3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zaoqvHzCeoOSITG3CDwZN8zRuQNELlrLf_6plGQgTX8=&emci=f8b811ab-6ca7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=b1d40850-74a7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=14145524)
---
Thank you for staying committed to this fight,
Team Sri
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17763910/205498530/2030123129?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWQ0MDg1MC03NGE3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zaoqvHzCeoOSITG3CDwZN8zRuQNELlrLf_6plGQgTX8=&emci=f8b811ab-6ca7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=b1d40850-74a7-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=14145524)

**Sri Preston Kulkarni** is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. | [Help send Sri to Congress! ➜](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17763911/205498531/1700156400?refcode=em_pet_2020.06.05_TS_b1_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWQ0MDg1MC03NGE3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zaoqvHzCeoOSITG3CDwZN8zRuQNELlrLf_6plGQgTX8=)

Bringing true representation to TX-22. | | I wanted you to be the first to know that our team put up our first ad this morning!

We are excited to let Kansans know, despite the crazy scenes they see on TV every night, I'm going to Washington to fight for our conservative values and rural way of life.
---
| [ ](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=e7b6e0f05f&e=a9d1410029)
---
| This ad is just the start. Our primary opponent is self-funding to the tune of $450,000. We've got to keep up on fundraising.

[Will you make a generous contribution today to help fund this ad buy?](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=c88313e6c8&e=a9d1410029)

Every single dollar counts.

Thank you for your support. Your prayers, volunteer hours, and kind words are so encouraging to me and Audrey.

We will win this campaign because of your generous support.

All my best,

P.S. Election Day is 59 days from today! More people are going to be voting by mail than ever before. [**_Your financial contribution today will help us target those voters early and get our message to them. _**](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=18da52c08e&e=a9d1410029)

name: Team Messner
subject: This Week: Rand Paul endorsement, jobs numbers, statement on civil unrest, and more
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Tap or click to read more >>
Entrepreneur. Veteran. Conservative. [Contact Us](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d49fbc30f26c616d/c60082ce84221e16c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | |
---
**Senator Rand Paul Endorses Corky Messner**

[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d49fbc30f26c616d/41e45bc959814bb4c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

Leading conservative U.S. Senator Rand Paul (R-KY) has endorsed Corky Messner in his run to unseat Democrat U.S. Senator Jeanne Shaheen.

“Corky Messner has my full support in this race and I truly look forward to serving with him in the United States Senate,” says Senator Paul. “One of my favorite things about New Hampshire is the ‘Live Free or Die’ spirit of independence and liberty. Having more senators in Washington who embody those ideals and can amplify that message in Congress is needed now more than ever. Fortunately, with Corky Messner, the Granite State has a candidate who is prepared to do just that.”

“Senator Paul has been a tireless advocate of personal liberty and individual freedoms, and I thank him for his support,” says Corky. “He has been a true role model for those of us who cherish the Constitution and understand the very real challenges facing this nation.”

Senator Paul is recognized as one of the nation’s leading advocates for liberty. Elected to the U.S. Senate in 2010, he is an outspoken champion for constitutional liberties and fiscal responsibility. As a fierce advocate against government overreach, Senator Paul has fought tirelessly to return government to its limited, constitutional scope.

“Corky Messner is an outsider who understands the need for more leaders who will buck the status quo and defend the Constitution,” says Paul. “He’s a businessman who knows how important it is to get our debt and deficit under control and our spending in check. He’s a veteran who has served our country honorably and believes, like President Trump and I do, that we must end the endless wars and take care of our veterans, who have sacrificed so much.”
|
---
**In the News**
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d49fbc30f26c616d/e4dc616a0c72e849c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
Corky recently connected with WKLX NH Now host Chris Ryan to talk about issues of the day, including the current racial unrest, and how our economy can recover following the COVID-19 pandemic and resulting lockdowns and closures. Tune in by clicking **[here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d49fbc30f26c616d/3730092404cd1e37c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**!
|
---
**Next Week, We Make it Official!**
This past week, Corky became the first candidate for major New Hampshire office to announce a filing date – **June 9**. Check our website and your email inbox for more details about the filing event in front of the State House in Concord.
|
---
**Signs of Better Economic Times Ahead**
Corky today pointed to the addition of 2.5 million jobs as a promising sign the nation’s economy is recovering from the COVID-19 shutdown.

“The numbers announced today by the Labor Department are certainly encouraging. In addition to new jobs, the U.S. unemployment rate dropped to 13.3 percent from 14.7 percent last month." He notes that while the numbers likely will be adjusted in the days to come, “hopefully, they will continue to point to better days ahead.”
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d49fbc30f26c616d/39dd78c375d9969dc3d6b838967d376c/33153)
He continues: “The fear was that the unemployment rate could reach 20 percent in May, but thanks to President Trump’s leadership, we are seeing signs that the economy is recovering from this pandemic and the lockdowns and closures. This is a testament to the strength of the economy before this public health challenge, but we must continue to work together to help New Hampshire businesses and individuals impacted by the events of the past few months.”
|
---
**Corky’s Statement on Ongoing Civil Unrest**
This past week, Corky commented on the unrest taking place nationwide in reaction to the death of African-American George Floyd while he was taken into custody by the Minneapolis Police Department on May 25:
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d49fbc30f26c616d/d4bbf3bcfa21c1aec3d6b838967d376c/33153)

“George Floyd’s death was horrific, senseless, and wrong. His family and loved ones deserve swift and fair justice, and I pray for them.

Today I am also praying for our country; I am praying for unity and for peaceful protests.

Bad actors like ANTIFA and other agitators are looting, committing acts of arson, rioting, and defacing cherished national memorials in the name of anarchy and chaos. These are not being done in the name of George Floyd – these are being done to tear us apart.”

**[Read more](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d49fbc30f26c616d/2c825c7015336bc5c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.
|
---
**Upcoming Events – Check Our Website!**
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d49fbc30f26c616d/4cf47b77543d3786c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
We recently hosted our biggest tele-town hall ever, and we continue our Conversations 2.0 roundtables and other virtual events, so check our website regularly for information about the campaign and opportunities to ask Corky _your_ questions.
“Conversations” events – Visit our website at **[CorkyforSenate.com](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d49fbc30f26c616d/be7c1e0d7729f947c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** to register!
Veterans Issues - Tuesday, June 9, at 6:30 p.m.
Second Amendment Rights - Wednesday, June 17, at 6:30 p.m.
Small Business & Economic Recovery - Tuesday, June 23, at 6:30 p.m.
|
---

name: Sandy Smith
subject: Time to fight the terrorists!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iyVxyWQlypNxmng&b=zYWFYrIN1mmOLJ47QOvH5g)
---
Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district.**

I am saddened by what has happened to George Floyd. It is a tragic loss of life, one that will start the conversation between law enforcement and local communities and result in positive productive change and help build a stronger America. This is something about which all of us agree.
However, I am FURIOUS about the violence and loss of life in the riots over the last week! That has nothing to do with justice for George!
**_Let's be clear: these riots are NOT "peaceful protests". They are violent, they are destructive, they are murderous- and they need to be quelled!_**

I for one am proud that President Trump is stepping up and restoring order, when the local mayors and governors would not.

**_The liberal Democrat mayors of Minneapolis, Philadelphia, New York and LA FAILED. They have allowed violent rioters to kill without consequence; they have allowed destruction of property and mass theft, even excusing and encouraging it!_**

_It started with Minneapolis Mayor Jacob Frey, who abandoned a police station. The mob burned the station in triumph, triggering yet more violence that spread across the nation._

_This policy of giving safe space to the violent was immortalized by former Baltimore Mayor Stephanie-Rawlings Blake, who allowed 2015 protests over the death in police custody of Freddie Gray to warp out of control._

_“It’s a very delicate balancing act,” she babbled as Baltimore burned. “... We also gave those who wished to destroy space to do that as well. And we worked very hard to keep that balance and to put ourselves in the best position to de-escalate.”_

This type of behavior has been happening since the Obama Administration and the Democrat mayors think it's a great idea to allow their cities to burn? WHY???

Why would anyone come and open a business or hire people in a city that could let the business be burned by an angry mob the next day?

_But actually, it's worse than that. _

**Antifa, the violent radical Communist organization, has been driving the riots to be MORE violent, more hateful, and more destructive!**

**This group is dangerous. They turn peaceful protests into chaotic, murderous riots. Their stated goal is the overthrow of America. **

That's why I'm thrilled that President Trump is taking on Antifa head on!

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iyVxyWQlypNxmng&b=zYWFYrIN1mmOLJ47QOvH5g)
---

Finally, an American president has the guts to name this group what they are- and take them on so they don't sunder us.

Now peaceful protests, I have no problem with. _But the minute cops get shot, the minute bricks are thrown, that's domestic terrorism- and WE MUST FIGHT IT! _

The stories of the violence and damage caused to innocent people is heartbreaking.

In Richmond, VA, a city with some of the worst violence, **t****hese people even burned an apartment building in Richmond with a helpless child inside- then stopped firefighters from coming to rescue the child! **

Richmond Police Chief Will Smith was in tears as he recounted:

_“Protesters intentionally set a fire to an occupied building on Broad Street. This is not the only occupied building that has been set fire to over the last two days. But they prohibited us from getting on scene,” Smith said. “We had to force our way to make a clear path for the fire department. Protestors intercepted that fire apparatus several blocks away with vehicles and blocked that fire department’s access to the structure fire. Inside that home was a child.”_

_“Officers were able to help those people out of the house. We were able to get the fire department there safely. When you take a legitimate issue and hijack it for unknown reasons, that is unacceptable to me. It's unacceptable to the Richmond Police Department and unacceptable to the City of Richmond.”_

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iyVxyWQlypNxmng&b=zYWFYrIN1mmOLJ47QOvH5g)
---

There is no justice here. No justice for the thousands of black-owned businesses burned down, their lives destroyed. No justice for the dozens of innocent African Americans killed in the riots - including three brave black cops who gave the ultimate sacrifice to protect our communities.

Totally uncalled for - we need to restore law and order NOW. I will work with President Trump to hunt down, prosecute, and imprison any member of Antifa who participated in domestic terrorism.

If you support our "President of Law and Order", as I do, **[I need YOUR help urgently](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iyVxyWQlypNxmng&b=zYWFYrIN1mmOLJ47QOvH5g) to defeat my high-level radical socialist Democrat opponent and retake this swing seat!**

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iyVxyWQlypNxmng&b=zYWFYrIN1mmOLJ47QOvH5g)
---

President Trump has accomplished so much with constant pushback from the socialists, like these governors and mayors. _Imagine what he can do with a supportive Congress!_

[Will you help me beat Butterfield and deprive Nancy Pelosi of a reliable vote?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iyVxyWQlypNxmng&b=zYWFYrIN1mmOLJ47QOvH5g) I need you to send $15, $35, or $250 right now so that I can go on the attack in NC against Butterfield!

**_I will NEVER vote with Nancy Pelosi! She and her insane leftist agenda can pound sand!_**

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iyVxyWQlypNxmng&b=zYWFYrIN1mmOLJ47QOvH5g), with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants would be a major, crippling blow to the socialist anti-American left and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda. Please rush back your supporting contribution today. Thank you.

G.K. Butterfield is a leftist extremist, not a patriot, but to replace him I [really need your help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iyVxyWQlypNxmng&b=zYWFYrIN1mmOLJ47QOvH5g). I appreciate you and thank you.

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iyVxyWQlypNxmng&b=zYWFYrIN1mmOLJ47QOvH5g)
---
Sandy Smith
Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District
Conservative
Entrepreneur & Military mom
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iyVxyWQlypNxmng&b=zYWFYrIN1mmOLJ47QOvH5g)
---
P.S. [Will you contribute $15, $60, $250, or your largest contribution?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iyVxyWQlypNxmng&b=zYWFYrIN1mmOLJ47QOvH5g) I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield.

name: Tina Smith
subject: Today would have been Breonna Taylor’s 27th birthday.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Today would have been Breonna Taylor’s 27th birthday. She was an EMT on the frontlines and was beloved by family and friends. Her murderers are still free. Breonna should be alive today, but it has been 84 days since her murder and the officers responsible have not been held accountable. This is a gross injustice. We cannot forget about Breonna. We cannot forget about Black women. We must keep fighting for her, Sandra Bland, Rekia Boyd, Atatiana Jefferson, and the countless Black women who have lost their lives at the hands of police. We must bring justice to Black women. We must say their names. We must fight for them. **[That’s why I’m asking you to take meaningful action today by adding a donation to the Black Women’s Health Imperative. If you’re in a place to give, please do so right here:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17765383/205538775/-1677449809?refcode=em200605-black-womens-health-imperative&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,1000&firstname=&lastname=&email=&addr1=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTM3OTE1MC04OGE3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w4NSFSjPziLrJ1o1H9rJtJZXvuVeIHoJJRzGXManoZw=)** | [Contribute now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17765384/205538776/-1677449809?refcode=em200605-black-womens-health-imperative&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,1000&firstname=&lastname=&email=&addr1=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTM3OTE1MC04OGE3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w4NSFSjPziLrJ1o1H9rJtJZXvuVeIHoJJRzGXManoZw=)
---
Police violence against Black women is too often ignored and pushed to the margins. No more.
We must demand justice for Breonna Taylor right now. Her life mattered. Black lives matter.
Thank you for taking action.
— Tina

name: Laura Loomer
subject: They don’t want them to work!
body:
Last night, I listened into the “town hall” held by my radical opponent Lois Frankel.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-378753-891881-5030075-85807be17c-371657d6b6)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-378753-891881-5030076-f5d3e7b6f1-371657d6b6) Last night, I listened into the “town hall” held by my radical opponent Lois Frankel.

While she could barely answer any questions, Frankel lit up when a caller asked if they are still required to look for work while receiving unemployment benefits.

“This is very frustrating!” she told her small audience.

“Lazy” Lois then passed the buck to a state senator who recommend people not look for work and just write “COVID 19” on the weekly form to keep getting those checks!

Insane.

It’s even more ironic now that the Trump Administration announced that we added 2,000,000 jobs in the last week!

Our economy will come ROARING back and Democrats are dead set on controlling the lives of as many people as possible by keeping them on the government dole.

That’s the Democrat way. It’s how they maintain their voter base. From Obamacare, Obamaphones, and now stimulus checks and unemployment checks that pay many people more money than they made when they were working.

But there’s no such thing as a free lunch.

You and I are footing the bill and Congressional Democrats like Frankel are piling on the debt.

She needs to go, and I’m more than ready to replace her – [**help me win today**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-378753-891881-5030076-f5d3e7b6f1-371657d6b6).

As we head into the weekend, [**we need to raise $12,000 by Monday morning**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-378753-891881-5030076-f5d3e7b6f1-371657d6b6) to fund our ad campaigns we’ll be kicking off!

Our ads will address the failures of “Lazy” Lois Frankel and her Democrat pals, and will offer solutions that will get our nation back on track.

[**Will you chip in now to help fund our ads?**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-378753-891881-5030076-f5d3e7b6f1-371657d6b6)

Any amount helps, whether $5, $10, or $100. Every dollar you can contribute helps us reach 50 voters. [**Donate all that you can so we can get started.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-378753-891881-5030076-f5d3e7b6f1-371657d6b6)

Thanks again for all that you do and I hope you have a great weekend!

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

It’s how they maintain their voter base. From Obamacare, Obamaphones, and now stimulus checks and unemployment checks that pay many people more money than they made when they were working. But there’s no such thing as a free lunch. You and I are footing the bill and Congressional Democrats like Frankel are piling on the debt. She needs to go, and I’m more than ready to replace her – . As we head into the weekend, to fund our ad campaigns we’ll be kicking off! Our ads will address the failures of “Lazy” Lois Frankel and her Democrat pals, and will offer solutions that will get our nation back on track. Any amount helps, whether $5, $10, or $100. Every dollar you can contribute helps us reach 50 voters. Thanks again for all that you do and I hope you have a great weekend! Respectfully, Laura Loomer Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited. Laura Loomer for Congress Inc 720 Lucerne Ave, #1465 LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

name: Will Van Nuys
subject: A historic election in New York
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conole for Congress
body:
---
| | Friends, Over the last few weeks, we have seen the calls for expanded vote-by-mail by fantastic Democratic leaders like Barack Obama -- as well as the attempts to delegitimize mail in ballots from Donald Trump and the GOP. But what you might not know is that for the first time EVER, New Yorkers will have access to voting by mail -- _and tens of thousands of voters already have ballots in their hands!_ **It 's going to take an unprecedented effort to reach out to voters and urge them to fill out their ballot for Francis and return it ASAP. [That's why we JUST launched our Ballot Chase Fund and we need to raise $5,000 by Sunday to be successful -- can you chip in?](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b476/388db0e9/8c1d776/609bfbce/2421154410/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJjb25fbW9udGhseV9qdW5lIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6IkNPTl9FTV9GUl8yMDA2MDVfQmFsbG90Q2hhc2UxX1UxX1gxIn0%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/con_monthly_june?refcode=CON_EM_FR_200605_BallotChase1_U1_X1&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=1+-+Thatrsquos+why+we+JUST+launched+our+Ball&utm_campaign=CON_EM_FR_200605_BallotChase1_U1_X1&source=CON_EM_FR_200605_BallotChase1_U1_X1")** | | | [Chip in $25 >>](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b476/388db0e9/8c1d776/609bfbcd/2421154410/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJjb25fbW9udGhseV9qdW5lIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6IkNPTl9FTV9GUl8yMDA2MDVfQmFsbG90Q2hhc2UxX1UxX1gxIn0%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/con_monthly_june?refcode=CON_EM_FR_200605_BallotChase1_U1_X1&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=2+-+Chip+in+25+gtgt&utm_campaign=CON_EM_FR_200605_BallotChase1_U1_X1&source=CON_EM_FR_200605_BallotChase1_U1_X1")

---
Don't get us wrong, we're THRILLED more voters will be able to have their voices heard in this critical election. But it means we had to adjust our campaign plan and expand our efforts in brand new creative ways.
We are on track to win -- and it's starting to resonate with voters that Francis is our only chance to flip this district from red to blue. Now, it's just a matter of making sure they turn in their ballots!
**This is an incredibly important goal for our campaign because the more votes we get "in the bank" right now, the more we can narrow our universe of voters we need to talk to in order to win.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Outvote?=
subject: Community Change's Mike Griffin on why he protests, and more anti-racism resources
body:
Learn about policy proposals to end police violence and support organizations working on the ground in Minnesota. | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/outvote/june-5-2020?e=0aad15100c)
---
| _Organizing for everyone._
---
| | | |
---
|
---
|
**Black Lives Matter.**

---
|
---
| [ ](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=cdf52eb685&e=0aad15100c)
---
_Image: Tsong-Taatarii / Star Tribune via AP_
Outvote has the privilege of working with a tremendous group of activists and organizers at **Community Change Action**. One of our Community Change partners, **Mike Griffin** , wrote a moving op-ed for NBC News last week. Mike shared why he is protesting in his native Minneapolis, and how the events of recent days have exemplified the need for change.

| [Read the Piece](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=298fd7ff2d&e=0aad15100c "Read the Piece")
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
**Anti-Racism Resources**

---
| Whether you are just beginning your anti-racism work or have long been an advocate for racial equality, learn from these resources:
* [Explore Campaign Zero's #8Can'tWait campaign](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=97ae2b164f&e=0aad15100c). Educate yourself on concrete policies proven to decrease police violence, and check which still haven't been implemented by your city. Contact your mayor or sheriff's office to demand action.

* [Listen to Outvote's own Mungi Ngomane discuss race in America on The Brand is Female podcast](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=5bc3489a6d&e=0aad15100c). Mungi and her mother, the granddaughter and daughter of Archbishop Desmond Tutu, share their thoughts on the struggle for racial justice informed by their family's history of defending human rights.

* [Engage with these scaffolded anti-racism resources](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=23f6c610f6&e=0aad15100c). This list of activities, books, podcasts, and more encourages you to evaluate where you are in your anti-racism journey and grow toward the next stage of allyship.

* [Support these Minnesota-based organizations working to advance racial equity](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=2cc0d4dcce&e=0aad15100c). [Reclaim the Block](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=e2dba5bc6e&e=0aad15100c) is maintaining a list of organizations most in need of resources as Minnesotans work toward progressive change.

---
|
---
|
---
| | | | **What We're Reading:**

---
| [ ](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=09a14bfc2b&e=0aad15100c)
---
[**When my protest becomes political, will you still believe Black lives matter?**](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=29265ed0a7&e=0aad15100c)

_6.1.20 | Medium_ Candace Hollingsworth, mayor of Hyattsville, MD, shares her policy priorities for securing Black futures.

[ ](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=d791f2c534&e=0aad15100c)
---
[**Destructive Power of Despair**](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=dc07a294f4&e=0aad15100c)

_5.31.20 | The New York Times_

Charles Blow contextualizes nationwide protests within longstanding anger and helplessness.
|
---
|
---
|
**What You Can Do: **

---
| | [ ](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=0c624a84bb&e=0aad15100c)
---
One of the most impactful ways to support protestors on the ground is to support bail funds. ActBlue is accepting donations to [a collection of funds around the country](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=6bd364b659&e=0aad15100c), allowing you to allocate your donation equally across funds.

---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
### "I am a 34-year-old man who knows that at any point I could be the next George Floyd...
And that’s why I am a protester."
******\- Mike Griffin, Senior Organizer at Community Change Action**
